programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed, and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: When You Die
programme.desc: What really happens when we die? For thousands of years, the dreams and visions of the dying have captivated cultures. But what are they and what causes them? And are they real?

programme.title: The Dead Wives Club: Vendetta
programme.desc: Sara Raras was a 35-year-old statistician who used her brilliant mind to calculate risk for a living at the National Security Agency. But this new mother could never have predicted the events that led to her haunting murder.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Forgotten But Fatal

programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace a life off the grid in Isla Mujeres, Mexico. He hires Richart Sowa and his son Eden to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Birth Mother
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler go to Ohio to meet a possible birth mother for their child.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Chandler Gets Caught

programme.title: Friends: The One Where the Stripper Cries
programme.desc: Monica and Rachel hire an ungainly stripper to perform for Phoebe's bachelorette party.

programme.title: Mom: Jail Jail and Japanese Porn

programme.title: Mom: Sonograms and Tube Tops
programme.desc: Christy plans a baby shower for Violet, who is nervous about becoming a mom. Meanwhile, Bonnie scores a new life-coaching client.

programme.title: Mom: Toilet Wine and the Earl of Sandwich

programme.title: Mom: Clumsy Monkeys and a Tilted Uterus
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie try to make sure everything goes smoothly when Violet finds the perfect couple to adopt her baby.

programme.title: George Lopez: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner, Honey
programme.desc: George believes he's found his father and invites the man home for Thanksgiving dinner.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Enrolls Like That

programme.title: George Lopez: George Keeps Truant to Himself
programme.desc: When the going gets tough, George drops out of school. His attempt to keep his truancy from Angie and the kids becomes the worst kept secret around when his professor stops by the house to check in.

programme.title: George Lopez: The Kidney Stays in the Picture
programme.desc: When Max starts wetting the bed, George laughs it off as childish. But as his symptoms worsen, Vic suggests it could mean Max is sexually active, prompting George and Angie to take him to the doctor where they learn that he needs surgery.

programme.title: George Lopez: A Funeral Brings George to His Niece

programme.title: Full House: The Miracle of Thanksgiving

programme.title: Full House: Back to School Blues
programme.desc: D.J. has a rough day at Junior High when she finds all the kids more grown-up than her.

programme.title: Full House: Dr. Dare Rides Again
programme.desc: When an old friend comes to visit Jesse, he tries to relive some of his recklessness.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Someone's in the Kitchen With Sandy/ The Inside Job
programme.desc: Plankton steals Sandy's fur to disguise himself as Sandy and get the Krabby Patty formula. Plankton goes inside SpongeBob's head to get the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Inmates of Summer/ To Save a Squirrel
programme.desc: Instead of getting on the ship headed for summer camp, SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally board a ship full of prisoners on their way to jail on Inferno Island.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Flea in Her Dome/ Donut of Shame
programme.desc: Sandy must get rid of her Tree Dome of fleas; Patrick feels bad about taking a donut.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Robosaurus/ Pups Save a Film Festival
programme.desc: When a homemade Robotic Dino named Earl comes to life, the pups need to find him, stop him, and bring him home. The pups are shooting their Film Festival entry until Daring Danny X cuts the action with his dangerous stunt.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Get Growing/ Pups Save a Space Toy
programme.desc: Fertilizer causes Yumi's crops to sprout huge veggies, so Ryder and the Paw Patrol must corral the stampeding produce. The Paw Patrol draws a message on Farmer Al's field to tell the space aliens the pups found their lost toy.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Meet Josh!
programme.desc: Something is missing from Blue’s snack, so we play Blue’s Clues with our new host Josh to find out what it is. With a little help from our old friends Steve and Joe, Josh finds out what Blue wants with her snack.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: 123's With Blue
programme.desc: Count along with Josh and Blue in this game of Blue’s Clues to find out what Blue wants to buy at the store. We help Shovel & Pail learn who has more graham crackers, then help Josh discover what he can buy with his Blue dollars.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Rescue Thanksgiving/ Pups Save a Windy Bay
programme.desc: The bouncy turkey has flown away. Later, a super-strong wind has suddenly swept up all the wind surfers.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save Bedtime/ Pups Save Chickaletta's Egg
programme.desc: The Turbots are trapped somewhere in the jungle. They tried to call the PAW Patrol, but their phone cut out. Chickaletta laid an egg, but it rolled away and is heading through town. The PAW Patrol has to catch it before it breaks.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Laugh With Blue
programme.desc: Josh is being silly but still can't get Blue to laugh. We play Blue's Clues to figure out what will make Blue laugh. While we look for clues we find patterns with a goofy gopher and locate all the mixed-up things in Silly Town.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Playdate With Magenta!
programme.desc: Blue’s friend Magenta is coming over today. We play Blue's Clues to figure out what Blue wants to do with Magenta. During our search for clues, we identify opposites and check out animal footprint with our friends Shovel & Pail.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Movie Monster!

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: ABC's With Blue
programme.desc: We are reading Blue's Clues to figure out what book Blue wants to read for story time. While looking for clues, we practice letter recognition and sound, help Mr. Salt & Mrs. Pepper with their grocery list and skidoo into a book.

programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Moving Dragon
programme.desc: While working at a pool store, Michael flies on a kickboard. Then, at a pet store, he breeds hamsters from pellets. He also stuns his helper on moving day with a fiery statue.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Might Be Trippin'
programme.desc: Find out which trick nearly wounded a delivery man, what illusion is difficult for even skilled magicians to pull off and why fans speculated the show was connected to the illuminati.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: The Communicators
programme.desc: A weekly program focusing on the politics of telecommunications through conversations with the people who shape the digital future.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire
programme.desc: Harry is selected as Hogwarts' representative in the Tri-Wizard Tournament. But between the stresses of school and the aching of his mysterious scar, he doesn't realize the forces of evil are plotting and he's a part of it.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix
programme.desc: Before his fifth year begins, Harry and his cousin are attacked by Dementors, forcing Harry to use magic outside of Hogwarts and therefore face the possibility of a trial and being expelled from the school. The Order of the Phoenix is founded.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince
programme.desc: Harry Potter and Dumbledore embark on a dangerous journey to defeat Harry's evil enemy, Voldemort. Meanwhile, the rest of the gang probe into the identity of the mysterious Half-Blood Prince.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 1
programme.desc: Khloe invites her ex to True's first birthday party, but an uncomfortable confrontation in front of family and friends leaves her questioning her decision.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company
programme.desc: Scott feels pressure to make sure both Kourtney and his girlfriend Sofia are happy on a family trip to Finland. When North gets an opportunity to star in a video with one of her idols, Kim worries that her daughter will have performance anxiety.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Have You Met Kim?
programme.desc: Kim gives the world an intimate look into the busiest week of her life as she prepared for the birth of her fourth baby, stars in a music video with Paris Hilton, and heads to the Met Gala. Kourtney finds out someone is stealing from her.

programme.title: Botched: Human Dolls
programme.desc: Plastic surgeons Terry Dubrow and Paul Nassif treat a woman with a uni-boob, an actress who has had six surgeries in search of the perfect nose, and make a house call for Justin, a self-proclaimed human doll.

programme.title: Botched: Vagina Bomb!
programme.desc: Transgender star Kimber James asks the doctors to fix her botched breasts, nose and vagina. Paul tackles a tragic deviated septum and internet celebrity Renee Talley wants her famous botched bottom fixed.

programme.title: Botched: The Wizard of Schnoz
programme.desc: Terry makes a breast cancer survivor feel whole again while Paul operates on two sisters' twin beaks, affirming that he is the true Wizard of Schnoz. Terry gets a visit from his favorite patient...his wife, Heather.

programme.title: Botched: Dolly'd Up
programme.desc: A celebrity impersonator wants to fix her saggy skin, Paul helps a woman with a potentially unfixable nose, and Daniella 'two spirits' Mendez wants a convertible implant for both a male and female option.

programme.title: Botched: The Living Doll
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow operates on a transgender woman's uni-boob, Dr. Nassif fixes a 24-year-old crater on a woman's nose and the Doctors meet Blondie who aspires to be a plastic doll.

programme.title: Botched: Mother Knows Breast
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif comes to the rescue of a cat lady, setting both her nose and her priorities straight. Dr. Dubrow assists a young woman who had a double mastectomy to beat cancer, and two pop stars try to make their way to center stage.

programme.title: Botched: Butchered Breasts and Nasal Nightmares
programme.desc: Mexican top model Carmen Campuzano visits the doctors in hopes of restoring her nose and career, while a discharged soldier wants to mend her butchered breasts to fit in as a civilian.

programme.title: Botched: Bums, Boobs, and Baklava
programme.desc: A British bum ambassador is packing on the pounds to get a Kim K inspired butt while Dr. Dubrow helps a mother of nine battle one of the worst cases of capsular contracture he's ever seen.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: We're talking live with Atlanta Housewife Nene Leakes plus Ne-Yo will be stopping by to help us get into the holiday spirit with his new Christmas album.

programme.title: Botched: Stitched Up Sisters
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow keeps it all in the family when he performs full body work on a pair of co-dependent sisters. Dr. Nassif operates on a large man with an even larger nose and the doctors meet Youtuber and extreme waist trainer Penny Brown.

programme.title: Botched: Where the Wildd Things Are
programme.desc: The doctors help the self-proclaimed 'most unlucky person in the world.' Lacey Wildd is back with a problem bigger than her boobs. A transgender showgirl seeks the Doctors help to become her favorite cartoon character.

programme.title: Botched: Here Comes Tummy Boo Hoo
programme.desc: In the season finale, Dr. Nassif helps a fellow Lebanese patient get the nose she wants in time for her wedding, Dr. Dubrow attempts to fix a woman's strip mall boob job, and Mama June from 'Honey Boo Boo' fame needs a fupa lift.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Turkey Day Delights
programme.desc: In the pre-heat, seven bakers must make a dessert combining cranberry with another flavour of the season. The main heat challenges the bakers to create a sweet treat that pairs coffee with an unusual flavour of coffee syrup.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Holiday Artistry
programme.desc: The holidays are a time for artistry and decorations, so for the pre-heat, inflatable holiday decorations inspire the six bakers' cute cream puff displays. In the main heat, the bakers dazzle the judges with delicious hand-painted eggnog cakes.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Light and Inspiring
programme.desc: The Festival of Lights ignites creativity in the pre-heat, when the five bakers have to update traditional rugelach with unexpected new flavors like cardamom, grapefruit, guava paste, peanut butter or chai.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: New Family Classics
programme.desc: The remaining four bakers are going cocoa-loco for the holiday season in the chocolaty pre-heat, when they have to combine common pantry ingredients like balsamic vinegar, potato chips, oatmeal, red wine, olive oil and more.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Gifts Of Greatness
programme.desc: Three bakers remain in the competition, and in the pre-heat, they have to create a beautiful edible holiday ornament display. For the final main heat, the bakers channel holiday gift shopping by creating a cake that is decorated like a gift.

programme.title: Ultimate Thanksgiving Challenge: $25,000 Thanksgiving

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Moving Target

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Back Road Bait

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Seeing Stars and Stripes

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Midnight Manhunt

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Dangerous Attitude
programme.desc: In a special episode, Game Warden Richards investigates some belligerent campers using public lands as their personal toilet. Game Warden Jones has his patience tested by an intoxicated boater. Game Wardens Bailey and Bailey serve a warrant.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bullets and Lies
programme.desc: A couple is suspected of killing a deer during off-season. Warden Iles transports orphaned baby armadillos for rehabilitation, and Warden Gould searches for a mountain lion that is lurking near a recreational park in Laredo.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wet and Wild
programme.desc: A hot summer weekend in Texas keeps wardens busy on the water. A festival attracts thousands of people to float the San Marcos River. Patrol on Lake Texoma leads to multiple arrests. A fisherman is questioned when he can't provide identification.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Red Flag
programme.desc: A landowner is spoken to for a second time about illegally hunting dove over bait. An injured deer is found hiding in a shed after being attacked. While pulling over a suspicious vehicle, the game wardens notice the driver hiding something under his seat.

programme.desc: The last polar bear in NYC is showing his age, so staff make sure he gets all the attention he needs. Also, a trio of red ruffed lemurs prepare for their debut and a new exhibit is constructed for the hellbender, a giant amphibian with a bad reputation.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Chimp Turf War
programme.desc: A power struggle unfolds on chimp island as dominant male Dylan is challenged by young pretender Carlos.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Brother's Return

programme.title: Black-ish: Unkept Woman
programme.desc: Dre and Bow's morning routine with the kids is changing now that Bow is taking some time off work. Meanwhile, Junior bonds with Diane now that he is in charge of driving his siblings to school.

programme.title: Black-ish: R-E-S-P-E-C-T
programme.desc: Dre and Bow confront gender biases of their own after finding out that both Junior and Zoey have become sexually active. Meanwhile, Ruby is hurt when she finds out that Jack and Diane have been hanging out with a friend's grandmother after school.

programme.title: Black-ish: White Breakfast
programme.desc: When Jack and Diane get in trouble at school, Dre and Bow have to figure out the right balance of discipline and support so that their kids aren't too afraid of authority nor feel entitled.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Mind and the Matter
programme.desc: An irritable man succumbs to a 'will power' book that allows him to make people vanish.

programme.title: Movie: Rings

programme.title: Movie: Arrival
programme.desc: When mysterious spacecraft touch down across the globe, expert linguist Louise Banks is brought to communicate with the aliens. Leading her own specialised team, she begins to understand the alien language. When tensions explode, she must prevent a war.

programme.title: Movie: Resident Evil: Afterlife
programme.desc: A woman helps a group of survivors who want to make their way to the supposedly safe haven known as Arcadia.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Strength in Numbers

programme.title: NCIS: Privileged Information

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Lost Skyscrapers
programme.desc: A ground-breaking experiment reveals how ancient Egyptians built the giant obelisks of Thebes, and new discoveries at this holy site could explain why these mysterious marvels triggered the downfall of the pharaohs and the end of Egypt's golden age.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Troy
programme.desc: The legendary lost city at the center of the Trojan War is Troy, but its existence has never been confirmed. Now, discoveries and cutting-edge science might prove if this place existed, and if the Greeks really conquered it with the infamous Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mount Rushmore: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Delving into the dark secrets behind one of the most iconic landmarks in America: Mount Rushmore. Scientists reveal the secret history of its creation, and what lies behind the rock.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mount Rushmore: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Delving into the dark secrets behind one of the most iconic landmarks in America: Mount Rushmore. Scientists reveal the secret history of its creation, and what lies behind the rock.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Troy
programme.desc: The legendary lost city at the center of the Trojan War is Troy, but its existence has never been confirmed. Now, discoveries and cutting-edge science might prove if this place existed, and if the Greeks really conquered it with the infamous Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Atlantis in America
programme.desc: New theories claim that the legendary sunken city of Atlantis could have actually been in the Americas. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate evidence that might shed more light on one of the world's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Aliens Submerged
programme.desc: Rob examines a set of bizarre markings that suggest a violent clash between prehistoric beasts. In California, he investigates if a strange lake is a home to alien life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: New World Secrets
programme.desc: Rob investigates a cluster of ancient ruins in New England that suggest Europeans arrived in the Americas almost 1,000 years before Columbus. Then, he heads to California where a dormant super volcano may be showing new signs of life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Texan Mass Extinction
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Quest for the Gold Rush Fortune
programme.desc: Millions of dollars of stolen Gold Rush treasure is rumored to have been stashed in a cave in Northern California. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Russian Yeti: The Killer Lives
programme.desc: In 1959, nine Russian students died mysteriously while hiking. Explorer Mike Libecki reinvestigates the mystery and finds clues suggesting the cause of the horrific deaths could be the work of a creature thought only to exist in folklore: the Yeti.

programme.title: The Lost Kingdom Of The Yeti: Legend of the Snow Beast
The Lost Kingdom Of The Yeti: Mysteries in the Mountains
Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: They're Hitting the Highway
programme.desc: A stolen vehicle is found abandoned, rolling backwards down the street.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: These Are the Streets
programme.desc: Stolen jeep followed; individuals are captured and a gun is recovered.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Timing Is Everything
programme.desc: Vinny knows all to well that criminals who go missing, often are the most dangerous.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: On the Stroll
programme.desc: Task Force is looking for a woman promoting prostitution of young children.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Couple on the Run
programme.desc: After a drug deal goes wrong, a man is shot and collapses behind a dumpster, ending up on life support. A couple are wanted in connection to this attempted murder.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Gun Store Heist
programme.desc: In Virginia Beach, Virginia, almost 30 handguns were stolen after thieves broke through the roof of a gun store. Detectives try to secure the firearms before the thieves have time to sell the guns on the streets.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Hip Hop Homicide
programme.desc: A rising hip-hop star is gunned down in Orlando, Florida and detectives work around the clock to bring closure to the mourning parents.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: 15 Years Running
programme.desc: In 1993 a man was convicted of selling narcotics in South Carolina. He had already been incarcerated for a similar charge before and, not wanting to return to prison, failed to show up to serve his time.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Devil on One Shoulder
programme.desc: The task force finds the streets of Newark busier than ever during a rainstorm. An unexpected surprise forces the unit into pursuit. A crazy driver puts the unit's wet-weather skills to the test.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Bail Out, Bail Out
programme.desc: An officer gets involved in a foot chase across the highway; the force uses a man's cigarettes to arrest him for theft.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Fastest Feet in the Fleet
programme.desc: The Unit has their busiest night; a break is taken to see who is the fastest in the unit.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Don't Think I Can Make It in Jail
programme.desc: The Task Force acquires a new piece of equipment and finds it to be very helpful. Later, the A.T.T.F helps the Newark police catch an armed robbery vehicle.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Moving Target
programme.desc: Deputy Mendez and the Fugitive Task Force search for a career criminal before another victim is robbed, assaulted, or worse.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Chasing a Ghost
programme.desc: Investigators search for a murder suspect in the towns and mountainsides of Puerto Rico, which proves to be a nightmare.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Houdini
programme.desc: Newark police catch a suspect red-handed, but back at the precinct, the suspect escapes from the interrogation room. After 'Houdini' eludes several attempts to capture him over the next two months, the Fugitive Task Force takes over.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Just One Step Behind
programme.desc: Detectives scour the streets to find people who are willing to provide information on a fugitive's whereabouts.

programme.desc: Witness the shocking story of how two young Florida boys were led to kill their father.

programme.title: American Justice: Framed
programme.desc: The shocking story of Clarence Brandley, an innocent man convicted of murder.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: Officers Roni and Cooper find themselves in a breathless foot chase after people are stabbed at a nightclub. Fire rescue's Doug and Stokes desperately try to save the life of a young man shot in his throat. A carjacking leads to a manhunt.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Dark Side of the City
programme.desc: For the men and women on the Nightwatch, two things never stop: the calls and the questions. The first responders do everything they can to save the victims of several shootings, a drug overdose and more.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Officer Tim Davis' morning run is interrupted by a barricaded gunman who has taken two women hostages, his sister and his girlfriend. Then the already nerve-racking domestic dispute grows even more tense when gunshots ring out inside the home.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Charles 'Chip' Huth and Kansas City SWAT head out on a high-stakes drug-warrant. The team will make simultaneous hits on two locations in the same apartment complex.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: It's a tense situation as Sgt. Paul Hamilton and his squad get caught up in a high-speed car chase to bring down a suspected auto theft ring. Later, Paul's squad joins Huth's to double their efforts and hit two houses at once.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Sr. Corporal Steve Claggett and other SWAT members practice their explosive breaching skills. Then, Steve rushes to the scene of an armed barricade where two suspects have allegedly robbed a convenience store.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Bloodlines
programme.desc: An elderly couple are found murdered in their home. At first it's believed to be a robbery-gone-wrong until detectives realize it may me a family member with a grudge.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dead Man Talking
programme.desc: Dedicated father of two, John Riebe, is found dead on the floor of his home in Toledo, Ohio. The investigation quickly turns on those closest to John, and a series of phone calls and voicemails prove key in uncovering a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Evil in South Texas
programme.desc: Billy Staton and his fiancé Leticia Castro vanish without a trace. Have they left town and eloped? The discovery of Billy's burnt out car and a shock confession, reveal a web of lies that only a secret recording can untangle the truth.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: No Remorse
programme.desc: Robin Sowders is brutally beaten in his home in Bloomington, Indiana and later dies from his injuries. When his wife turns up at the police station, the investigation turns on its head. Only a wiretap will eventually reveal the truth.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Missing Forever: What Really Happened to Etan Patz?
programme.desc: In 1979, 6-year-old Etan Patz set out to walk two blocks from his home to his school bus stop in New York City, but he never made it.

programme.desc: An unlikely pair of investigators is tasked with solving a heartbreaking murder that has tormented a family for years.

programme.desc: A young schoolteacher is savagely murdered in the doorway of her own home.

programme.title: Dead of Night: He Shouldn't Be With Us
programme.desc: A woman's attempt to flee a troubled relationship leads to her demise. Police discover a haunting message left behind, but the case goes cold for years until a prime suspect's macabre desire for blood is revealed.

programme.title: Dead of Night: Alibi Lullaby
programme.desc: Police are puzzled when a gruesome murder shakes their small town. A cryptic message is left behind at the scene, but the identity of the killer remains a mystery. Promises are broken and old secrets emerge, breathing new life into the investigation.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cooking with Fire
programme.desc: After leaving a violent ex-husband and firing a problem employee, 21-year-old Cathy Whitehead is happy to build a life with the man of her dreams. But when a stranger shows up on her doorstep one night, she's soon caught up in the web of a familiar foe.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Neighbor From Hell
programme.desc: After Lois Pearson turns down a date with her neighbor Jeffrey Maxwell, she thinks that's the last she'll see of him on her rural Texas land. But six years later, he's back -- and it's clear he's still holding a grudge.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cooking with Fire
programme.desc: After leaving a violent ex-husband and firing a problem employee, 21-year-old Cathy Whitehead is happy to build a life with the man of her dreams. But when a stranger shows up on her doorstep one night, she's soon caught up in the web of a familiar foe.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Run for Your Life
programme.desc: 19-year-old Micah Rineis striking out on her own when she falls for fellow college student Thomas Pate. But when their love takes her far away from family and friends, Micah begins to wonder who she can really trust.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Somebody's Watching
programme.desc: Everyone loves 25-year-old Sandy Jeffers, but little does she know that one man is completely obsessed with her. When she finally comes face to face with her stalker, the events that follow are twisted, torturous, and ultimately fatal.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: There's No Place Like Home
programme.desc: When a masked man robbing a house is interrupted by the daughter of the house, Sarah Harris, and later her father, the intruder goes to horrible lengths to cover his crimes.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Every Step You Take
programme.desc: College dancer Jodi Sanderholm has spent weeks practicing her team's big performance. So when she vanishes hours before the event, it doesn't make sense - until a friend comes forward with strange details about the days leading up to Jodi's disappearance.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: The Millers always thought something was off with their oldest son Steven. But as he slips from strange into sinister, there's no telling how far Steven will go to get his respected New York family's attention.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Bad Son
programme.desc: Matthew Heikkila has always had a rocky relationship with his parents, but he has a plan on how to deal with them. On a cold November day, he murders them in their own home - and is determined to keep the nightmare going for his own girlfriend.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Midlife Crisis
programme.desc: After a string of bad dates, Texas social worker Deborah Houchin believes she's finally found the man of her dreams. But not long after talk turns to marriage, Deborah disappears. It will take the help of her coworkers to find out what happened.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Nazi Jewel Heist
programme.desc: When the U.S. military takes over the German Kronberg Castle in 1945, a scandalous affair between a U.S. Army Captain and Air Force Officer ensues, resulting in one of the most elaborate treasure heists of all time.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Sicilian Connection
programme.desc: Incensed by their treatment under Mussolini's regime and anxious to re-establish their European criminal network, a number of mafioso, including incarcerated kingpin Charles 'Lucky' Luciano, offered their full support to American intelligence officers.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Blackout Killers
programme.desc: Two serial killers take advantage of the blackouts in Nazi Germany and Britain that were meant to defend against enemy bombing.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.desc: The crew builds a custom double-decker dock for a pilot's family featuring a seaplane landing strip. The dock also boasts two levels for entertaining, a dining space with a large custom table, living space and a bar.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1690s Living Room Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff is recruited by a couple to do a true restoration of the original living room in their 1690s stone home. They also want to enclose the attached vestibule to create a mudroom. They want it to blend in with the rest of the home with stone walls.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1700s First Floor Restoration
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin is recruited by homeowners Scott and Rhonda to fully restore the first floor sunroom, living room and dining room of their 1700s stone home.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1737 Entryway and Kitchen
programme.desc: Lisa and Tom ask Jeff to work on their 1737 stone home in Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania. They ask him to address the first floor and the kitchen. Jeff and his team bring unique 1800s elements into the entryway room and give the kitchen an 1800s overhaul.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1740 Little House Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff is recruited to restore a 1740 stone home that sits behind couple Kelly and Rob's suburban 1990s home. They call it the "little house," and it sat right in the middle of the action of one of the most famous Revolutionary War battles.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Master Suite
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin takes on a dated master suite in Bucks County, Pennsylvania. Kim and Rob's 18th century house was damaged by a fire and last renovated in the 1980s.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Guest House Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff restores a kitchen and living room in a 1760 farmhouse for Tracey and Scott, who now use it as a guest house. The house was the original structure on their farm, which now contains a newer main house and several outbuildings.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Classic Colonial Parlor
programme.desc: An 1800s Center Colonial farmhouse addition to a 1760 stone home is turned into a classic parlor with a bar area and a billiards room.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1717 Farmhouse Kitchen
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin takes on a kitchen and living area in a rundown 1717 farmhouse. The original hardwood floors are a mess, the foyer and living room are drab and the kitchen addition doesn't match the character of the original house.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1684 Basement Gut Job
programme.desc: Jeff heads to Aston, PA, to restore the basement of one of the oldest houses in the area. The owners want to use the space for entertaining, so Jeff creates two bar areas, a sitting area, and restores an adjacent space to make a mudroom and entryway.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1700s Master Bedroom and Library
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin restores a master bedroom and library in an amazing stone home in Bucks County, PA. The original home dates back to 1700 but the two rooms sit in additions that came later and lack some of the historic character.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1729 Kitchen and Living Room Addition
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin heads to a 1729 home to look at the kitchen and living room additions. He brings in reclaimed barn beams to create a threshold in between the rooms, adds a unique blend of rustic cabinetry and makes a coffee table out of a surprise piece.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1740s Master Suite in a Barn
programme.desc: John and Tina own a converted 1740s barn and they need help with their awkward master bedroom and bath.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Mountain Lodges
programme.desc: A Colorado couple attempts to build one of the most energy-efficient homesteads in the state. Mother Nature and bleeding edge technologies give them a run for their money as they race to complete their high-end alpine lodge before winter hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect builds a modern California cabin that rivals the views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin Wanderlust
programme.desc: A young cabin builder creates a one-of-a-kind cabin in upstate New York during the harsh winter months. Due to the new and complicated design, the crew must adapt to the environment, work efficiently and leave no room for mistakes.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Match.Com
programme.desc: Love is in the air as four bakers battle for the chance to bring their cupcakes to one of Match.com's exclusive Stir Events in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Good, the Bacon, the Ugly

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Breakfast Of Champions
programme.desc: Noah digs into morning meals with something for everyone, from the sinfully sweet Cinnamon Roll Waffle to the hearty and delicious Breakfast Poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Berry Delicious
programme.desc: Berries might be little but they're full of huge flavor, just like the seven berry sweet dishes Noah will be sampling in this episode. Noah will so discover that berries are good on everything.

programme.desc: Cricket persuades the family to hit up a Thanksgiving sale for a sweet deal on a new TV. Tilly hits it off with Anoosh, the neighborhood cat.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Night Bill/ Cheap Snake
programme.desc: When Bill sneaks out at night with a mysterious duffel bag in tow, the kids hide in his truck to see where he goes. Cricket impulsively decides to buy a giant pet snake.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater
programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Parade Day/ DIY Guys
programme.desc: Cricket leaves Gloria to work the coffee shop alone while he enjoys the parade on his break.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Barry Cuda/ Suite Retreat
programme.desc: Cricket uses his first tip from working at Big Coffee to buy a singing toy fish. Gramma kicks the family out of the house for the day.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rated Cricket / Homeshare Hoedown
programme.desc: On the trip to Big City movie multiplex, Cricket thinks he’s too mature for a kids’ movie, so he sneaks into a grown-up movie. Cricket registers his house on a homeshare website.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies
programme.desc: When Bill grows a huge watermelon, Cricket invites the local news to see the mega melon. Cricket stands up to the cyberbullying of three online gamers known as the Cyber Knights.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fill Bill / Critterball Crisis
programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy / Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Tour / Dinner Party
programme.desc: Tilly takes Gramma out to be a tourist for a day. Cricket and Remy arrange a dinner party for everyone to get to know each other.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: The Greatest: Innovations
programme.desc: College football has continually evolved and innovated in ways that have made the game safer, more entertaining, and more exciting. These are the top 11 innovations that have impacted the sport's history.

programme.title: The Greatest: Inspiring Moments
programme.desc: If the best parts of sports are how they can inspire people, college football has enjoyed a wealth of unforgettable moments that fans will cherish forever. These are the top 11 of those highlights, on the field and off.

programme.title: The Greatest: Walk-Ons
programme.desc: There's a difference, it turns out, between impossible and improbable. In college football's long history, there have been a handful of incredible stories of walk-ons who became stars. These are the top 11 of all time.

programme.title: The Greatest: Voices
programme.desc: As college football has played out, the voices who've told the stories have become an indelible part of the tale themselves. These are the top 11 of those voices – at the typewriter, at the microphone and in front of the camera.

programme.title: The Greatest: Uniforms
programme.desc: In college football, uniforms are at the core of a team's identity and its pride. These are the top 11 colors, combinations, and flourishes of all time on uniforms, helmets, and more, all across the country.

programme.title: The Greatest: Rivalry Games
programme.desc: Every season, college football rivals face off, and the intensity and passion are at a fever pitch. Some clashes have resulted in unforgettable games. These are the top 11 of those quintessential, classic gridiron battles.

programme.title: The Greatest: Upsets
programme.desc: College football has always been a game of Davids and Goliaths. Some of the most indelible results have been the ones that were least expected. These are the top 11 upsets, and the stories behind them.

programme.title: The Greatest: What-Ifs?
programme.desc: Part of the fun is wondering what might have happened if a call went one way instead of another, or a key figure made a different decision or the rules were just a little different. These are the top 11 hypotheticals of all time.

programme.title: The Greatest: College-to-Pro Coaches
programme.desc: The best coaches can lift their programs to great heights, but not every great college coach can also succeed in the pros. These are the top 11 of all time who've succeeded in both the college and pro ranks.

programme.title: Golic and Wingo
programme.desc: Longtime friends and veteran voices, Mike Golic and Trey Wingo, join forces to bring you your one-stop-morning-shop for the biggest sports stories of the day.

programme.title: The Dan Le Batard Show
programme.desc: Thought-provoking discussion on the day’s sports stories, interviewing celebrities and players with Le Batard’s brand of self-depreciating humor.

programme.title: The Stephen A. Smith Show
programme.desc: Stephen A. Smith offers up his unique perspectives on the world of sports and much more.

programme.title: The Will Cain Show
programme.desc: Will Cain gives you his unfiltered take on the biggest stories in the sports world.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: After getting off on the wrong foot with his future in-laws, Greg now faces a greater challenge: introducing his straight-laced in-laws to his own free-spirited family.

programme.title: Movie: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: A man's life begins to fall apart as he deals with a divorce and managing his children. After meeting and befriending a young bachelor he learns how to navigate the single life.

programme.title: His Dark Materials: The Spies
programme.desc: Following her kidnapping, Lyra finds help from an unlikely place, which helps her put together more about her past and keep safe from Mrs. Coulter and the Magisterium.

programme.title: Movie: Little
programme.desc: A woman with a high-pressure career is transformed into a younger version of herself.

programme.title: Watchmen: It's Summer and We're Running Out of Ice
programme.desc: In an alternate America where police conceal their identities behind masks to protect themselves from a terrorist organization, Detective Angela Abar and Chief Judd Crawford investigate the attempted murder of a cop.

programme.title: Watchmen: Martial Feats of Comanche Horsemanship
programme.desc: As Angela relives haunting memories of an attack on her family, she detains a mysterious man who claims responsibility for Tulsa’s most recent murder. Elsewhere, an original play is performed for an audience of one.

programme.title: Watchmen: She Was Killed by Space Junk
programme.desc: Following a late-night visit from the Senator who authored Masked Policing Legislation in Oklahoma, FBI agent Laurie Blake heads to Tulsa to take over the recent murder investigation. Far away, the Lord of the Estate draws unwelcome attention.

programme.title: Watchmen: If You Don't Like My Story, Write Your Own
programme.desc: Reclusive trillionaire Lady Trieu finally enters the stage with a mysterious offer. With Blake getting closer to the truth of her coverup, Angela enlists Looking Glass for help. Meanwhile, the Lord trains two new servants.

programme.title: Watchmen: Little Fear of Lightning
programme.desc: The origin story of Looking Glass is at last revealed, as is the truth behind the greatest hoax in American history. Far away, the Smartest Man in the World plots a daring escape.

programme.title: Movie: The Lucky Ones
programme.desc: Three soldiers on leave try to make sense of their lives during an unexpected road trip across the United States.

programme.title: Movie: The Conjuring 2
programme.desc: Lorraine and Ed Warren are asked to go to North London to help a single mother of four deal with the supernatural entities in her house. Lorraine discovers that the family is merely a pawn in a deadly battle, and she fights to save their souls.

programme.title: Movie: Upgrade
programme.desc: After his wife is murdered during a violent mugging that leaves him paralyzed, a man is implanted with an experimental computer chip that not only helps him walk again but also gives him superhuman fighting abilities that he uses to get revenge.

programme.title: Movie: Darkman
programme.desc: A scientist reinvents himself as 'Darkman' after he is brutally attacked by henchmen.

programme.title: Movie: Slow Burn
programme.desc: A mayoral candidate uncovers a web of corruption when his girlfriend is accused of murder.

programme.title: Movie: The 15:17 to Paris

programme.title: Movie: The Invasion
programme.desc: Carroll Bennell, a psychiatrist in Washington believes that her son may hold the key to finding a cure for an alien body invasion outbreak.

programme.title: Movie: Mortal Engines
programme.desc: Many years after a global cataclysm, civilization's remnants live in mobile predator-cities that consume all in their path. With the world's resources running out, it falls to a mysterious young woman to face her past and defeat the biggest city all.

programme.title: Movie: Green Lantern
programme.desc: When a test pilot is given a magical ring, he inherits supernatural powers. With this ring comes the responsibility to become part of an interspatial battalion that is charged with creating peace among the universe.

programme.title: Back to Life

programme.title: Back to Life
programme.desc: Miri is excited for her first day of work at Nathan's fish & chips shop, but the community isn't taking kindly to her return.

programme.title: Back to Life

programme.desc: Gloria is jealous of another couple's activity level and demands that Jay step it up for a night of salsa dancing. Cameron takes a bet too far when Mitchell and Crispin challenge him to get a woman's number at the bar.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is killed by her mother and father in her own home. The parents say they acted in self-defence but the forensic evidence indicates otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: The Dead Wives Club: Vendetta

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten

programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue

programme.desc: At one of the biggest aviation expos in the country, Ken and Danny track down a vintage Stearman biplane. Mike Kennedy helps an old pilot retrieve his stolen skywriting plane, and Kevin and Heather pose as tourists in order to attempt a rare mid-air repo.

programme.desc: Ken Cage and Danny Thompson try to repo two planes from a much-feared criminal. Meanwhile, Mike Kennedy's on a mission to repo a plane being stripped by a stolen-parts ring. And Kevin Lacey gets cozy with a debtor in order to swipe his classic jet.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Ken Gets Played
programme.desc: A debtor suddenly swipes the helicopter that Ken and Danny were only seconds away from repossessing. Mike Kennedy enlists the help of his wife, Valerie, in a daring plot to seize a charter jet. Kevin is swarmed by FBI agents after an exhausting repo.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tiana and James

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Ray and Lexi

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Angel and Remy

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Vince and Alyssa

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kayla and Courtney

programme.title: The First 48: Bloodline

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: James

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Bobby
programme.desc: Bobby shot girlfriend Krissi's mother and father as they slept in their home in Frisco, Texas. The mother died, but the father survived. Bobby was sentenced to life despite claims he was manipulated into committing the murder.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Ronald

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Otis

programme.title: The First 48: Ringside Seat

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Employee of the Month Redux
programme.desc: While the other Titans are trying to stop a cow-stealing UFO, Beast Boy gets a job to buy a moped.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Brain Percentages
programme.desc: A desire to find the hidden images in a puzzle finds Beast Boy learning to use more than ten percent of his brain.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: BBCYFSHIPBDAY
programme.desc: Beast Boy and Cyborg celebrate the birthday of their friendship.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Beast Girl
programme.desc: As the Titans deal with Madame Rouge, Beast Boy is excited to meet his female counterpart Beast Girl.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Mo' Money Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Beast Boy convinces Robin to give the titans a tour of Wayne Manor. The others believe that money must solve all problems, but Robin thinks it's a vice.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Chicken in the Cradle
programme.desc: Beast Boy lays an egg, but instead of taking care of his newly-hatched chick he goofs off and lets the others deal with it.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Power of Shrimps
programme.desc: Aqualad uses shrimps and prime rib to try to win back Raven.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: BBRBDAY
programme.desc: When he isn't invited to Beast Boy's birthday party, Robin throws his own party, with special guest Bob Uecker.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Pie Bros.
programme.desc: Cyborg's birthday is coming up, so Beast Boy takes a job at their favorite pie shop so he can buy a birthday gift.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Cyborg convinces Raven to create a magical double of himself and Beast Boy so they will both always have someone to play with.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Ghost Boy
programme.desc: Beast Boy pretends to be a ghost haunting Starfire so she will do his bidding. When she figures out the ruse, she and the other Titans convince Beast Boy that he’s actually dead.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Hey Pizza!
programme.desc: Robin struggles with whether to build a senior center or a pool, while Beast Boy and Cyborg try to get a pizza for free.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Gorilla
programme.desc: Beast Boy turns into a loud, obnoxious gorilla and refuses to change back, driving Robin crazy. Gorilla Beast Boy takes over the leadership of the Titans, which leads to chaos.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: You're Fired
programme.desc: Beast Boy's poor job performance leads to his being fired from the Titans. After auditioning possible replacements, a pair of shape-shifting twins is hired.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Starliar/ Terra-ized
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Burger vs. Burrito/ Matched
programme.desc: Cyborg and Beast Boy compete to figure out whether burgers or burritos are better; Cyborg's Love Matcher 5000 program pairs Raven with Beast Boy and Starfire with Aquaman.

programme.title: American Dad!: Love, AD Style
programme.desc: Roger opens a bar in the Smith family's attic and recruits Hayley as his main entertainer. Soon, all of Langley Falls becomes enthralled by her singing, including Roger. Stan tries to prove his manhood by negotiating a good deal on a new car.

programme.title: American Dad!: Killer Vacation
programme.desc: The Smith's tropical vacation is not so relaxing when Stan is assigned a mission to kill the activities director at their resort. Hayley and Jeff try to rekindle their fading romance, while Roger falls for an older gentleman.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Kids Run the Restaurant
programme.desc: When the kids are left home alone, they transform the basement of the restaurant into a makeshift casino.

programme.title: River Monsters: Canadian Horror
programme.desc: From Canada's waterlogged wilderness comes stories of a 20-foot lake monster that attacks humans. Freshwater detective Jeremy Wade tries to track down this shadowy predator with a mouth said to resemble a bear-trap.

programme.title: River Monsters: Man-Eating Monster
programme.desc: Locals call it the lau-lau, a creature said to swallow men whole. Jeremy has hunted the legendary Amazon giant for years and this time he's not coming back without the single colossal specimen.

programme.title: River Monsters: South Pacific Terrors
programme.desc: In Fiji, people are coming under attack from unseen assailants in the water, but it's not clear if there are multiple culprits or a single persistent perpetrator. Jeremy Wade battles tropical storms and thick jungle in an all-out search for a culprit.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deep Sea Demon
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes in search of the real creature behind the enduring legend of the sea serpent -- starting with a violent attack in the English Channel and culminating in the dark depths of the Mediterranean Sea.

programme.title: River Monsters: Amazon Apocalypse
programme.desc: Hundreds died when the Sobral Santos sank on the Amazon, many rumoured to have been eaten alive. Jeremy retraces the doomed boat's last voyage and faces adversaries as he tries to uncover what was being the Amazon Apocalypse.

programme.title: River Monsters: Volcanic Island Terror
programme.desc: On a volcanic island in the Pacific, a fishing community is being terrorized by something in the water that's left behind a trail of bloodied victims. The only clue they have to the attacker's identity are the large puncture wounds it's left behind.

programme.title: River Monsters: Coral Reef Killer
programme.desc: When a snorkeler is impaled and killed by an unseen underwater assailant in the waters surrounding the tropical island of Sulawesi in Indonesia, Jeremy Wade travels to the remote islands to investigate a spate of similar attacks across the region.

programme.title: River Monsters: Amazon Apocalypse
programme.desc: Hundreds died when the Sobral Santos sank on the Amazon, many rumoured to have been eaten alive. Jeremy retraces the doomed boat's last voyage and faces adversaries as he tries to uncover what was being the Amazon Apocalypse.

programme.title: River Monsters: Volcanic Island Terror
programme.desc: On a volcanic island in the Pacific, a fishing community is being terrorized by something in the water that's left behind a trail of bloodied victims. The only clue they have to the attacker's identity are the large puncture wounds it's left behind.

programme.title: River Monsters: Coral Reef Killer
programme.desc: When a snorkeler is impaled and killed by an unseen underwater assailant in the waters surrounding the tropical island of Sulawesi in Indonesia, Jeremy Wade travels to the remote islands to investigate a spate of similar attacks across the region.

programme.title: River Monsters: Amazon Flesh Eaters
programme.desc: Wade seeks the notorious flesh eaters of the Amazon, including a fish that can swallow a man whole.

programme.title: River Monsters: Amazon Apocalypse
programme.desc: Hundreds died when the Sobral Santos sank on the Amazon, many rumoured to have been eaten alive. Jeremy retraces the doomed boat's last voyage and faces adversaries as he tries to uncover what was being the Amazon Apocalypse.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Forces of Nature
programme.desc: Steve joins the U.S. military for a wild experience on the flightline in F-15s and F-16s. He works with the Rangers to remove venomous snakes from harm's way.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Fuzzy Puppy Stars
programme.desc: Star-struck Snow is a Great Pyrenees puppy who dreams of following in her movie star mom's paw prints. A pair of Border Collie pups will need to be brave if they're going to be champion herders. And a Scottish Terrier tries to win over the resident cat.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Evil Kashmir
programme.desc: A woman's cat turned evil when they moved in with her boyfriend.

programme.title: The Zoo: Baby Bunnies, Big World
programme.desc: Crate training Nikita the Amur tiger in preparation for her move to Washington, DC proves challenging. An endangered Chinese alligator shows signs of being pregnant. Plus, staff prepare to release rare New England cottontail rabbits into the wild.

programme.title: The Zoo: Grumpy Cats' New Digs
programme.desc: Iray, a red ruffed lemur, is rushed to the health center when keepers discover a wound on his leg. A new exhibit is built for the Pallas's cats, the original grumpy cats. Plus, seven adorable baby turtles join the zoo's colony of an endangered species.

programme.title: The Zoo: Giraffe in the City
programme.desc: A sweet giraffe named Mashengo journeys from the Indiana Zoo to his new home in the Bronx. Keepers hand-raise endangered ducklings and release them onto the duck pond at the Central Park Children's Zoo. Plus, love is in the air for a pair of cloud rats.

programme.title: Give a Dog a Home: Live!
programme.desc: There are thousands of animals in shelters across the U.S. in need of good, loving homes. Now Animal Planet, with Best Friends Animal Society, wants to connect these animals directly to our viewers, live and in real time.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Shelter From the Storm
programme.desc: Tia hires three new parolees, but things quickly take a turn for the worse. A rural shelter threatened with closure needs Tia's help. And a family recovering from the loss of their home and dog in a flood comes to VRC looking for a new best friend.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: New Arrivals
programme.desc: Tania races to rescue a mama dog clinging to life after being in labour for two days. A young woman comes to Villalobos looking for a roommate to share her new home with.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Collision Course
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett track a hunter at an illegal bait site. Officers Towne, Matson and Jones investigate a teenage hunter with a changing story. And a routine patrol in icy conditions becomes a life-changing event for Officer Lucas.

programme.title: Martin: Girlfriend
programme.desc: Gina's old friend, Monique, annoys everybody until Martin finds a way to expose Monique's insincerity.

programme.title: Movie: Blue Streak
programme.desc: A jewel thief is released from jail and sets out to find his hidden loot. However, when he returns to his hiding spot he finds the area has been turned into a police station and his only shot of recovering the diamonds is to impersonate a detective.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome Home, Roscoe Jenkins
programme.desc: A successful Los Angeles talk show host heads home to the Deep South to reunite with his family. Once there, he learns how easy it is fall back into old rivalries.

programme.title: Movie: Little Man
programme.desc: A family mistakenly adopts a vertically challenged criminal on the run from the police, not realizing he is a man and not a child.

programme.title: Martin: Romantic Weekend
programme.desc: Gina and Martin end up in the same island resort as Tommy and Pam. Each couple competes to have more fun.

programme.title: Martin: The Bachelor Party
programme.desc: Martin and Gina worry at their bachelor parties, and imagine what life will be like in five years.

programme.desc: Exasperated with their bickering friends and feuding relatives, Martin and Gina sneak away on the night before their wedding.

programme.desc: Hoping to sign Billy Blanks as her client, Desiree starts taking his Tae-Bo classes.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Deck the Halls

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Lucky Charms

programme.title: Martin: Checks, Lies and Videotape

programme.title: Martin: Come on Over to My Place

programme.title: Martin: Scrooge
programme.desc: Martin is visited by the Ghosts of Christmas Past, Present and Future.

programme.title: Martin: Why Can't We Be Friends (Part 1)

programme.title: Martin: Why Can't We Be Friends (Part 2)

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Into the Fox Hole

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: It's Raining Hen
