programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Ruff Day at the Office
programme.desc: It’s ready, set, VET as Dr. Pol and the other vets race to take on emergency after emergency in one frantic Friday.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Chubby Bunny
programme.desc: The Pol Clinic is packed to the gills with a mini-pig, giant bunny, pregnant dog and a busted hen.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Black and White and Pol All Over
programme.desc: A swift kick from a horse forces Charles to sit out on farm calls, so it’s up to Diane to fill his coveralls as the original dynamic duo of Dr. and Mrs. Pol helps a zany little zebra, castrate a powerful racehorse, and treat a cow with teat trouble.

programme.title: The Lost Kingdom Of The Yeti: Revenge of the Ice Monster
The Lost Kingdom Of The Yeti: Is It Real?
How the Universe Works: Dawn of Life
programme.desc: We're on the verge of uncovering the how life on Earth came to be. Our origin is a hotly contested scientific debate.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dark History of the Solar System
programme.desc: Our solar system hides a dark and violent past, and new discoveries reveal that Earth and the planets were formed from the destruction of strange alien worlds that came before us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Saturn's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Cutting-edge NASA missions to Saturn and its moons are turning up brand-new discoveries that are revealing the greatest secrets of this strange, ringed planet.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Black Holes: The Secret Origin
programme.desc: Recent discoveries could explain how supermassive black holes grow so big, one of the universe's most mysterious questions. Neither dark matter nor cannibalism can fully explain these monsters, but the latest science might finally provide an answer.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Cassini's Final Secrets
programme.desc: For twenty years, NASA's Cassini spacecraft revealed the strange secrets of Saturn until it vaporized in its atmosphere in a blaze of glory. Today its legacy lives on, as fresh data from the probe helps scientists make brand-new discoveries.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Journey to Saturn's Rings
programme.desc: New discoveries are changing everything we know about Saturn's rings, revealing that they're newer and more mysterious than we ever imagined, and that some day soon, they might disappear forever.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Black Holes: The Secret Origin
programme.desc: Recent discoveries could explain how supermassive black holes grow so big, one of the universe's most mysterious questions. Neither dark matter nor cannibalism can fully explain these monsters, but the latest science might finally provide an answer.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn's secrets are out. The ferocious weather, the evolving ring system and the discovery of active geology on Saturn's moons has rewritten the textbooks. Scientists are looking for life on Saturn's moons and they may have found it on Titan.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Midnight Train to Hell
programme.desc: A sinister locomotive breathes fire into the night sky, and locals fear it's a demonic train coming to claim their souls. When something terrifying emerges from a mysterious lake in Ireland, experts wonder if it could be a modern-day leviathan.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Osiris
programme.desc: A camera captures a person inexplicably bursting into flames. An ancient statue at a museum appears to come to life at night. An alien-like creature is filmed in the sewers. Eerie lights caught on camera may explain a mysterious death.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Incident at Area 51
programme.desc: Near Area 51, a police convoy is filmed transporting an alien-looking craft in the dead of night. When strange beams of light are reported in Argentina, experts investigate if it's proof of a terrifying Nazi superweapon.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Omen of Blood River
programme.desc: When a river of blood washes through a city's streets, some witnesses believe it's a warning of doomsday. A strange perfect circle emerges in the clouds about California, and some experts speculate that it's evidence of alien activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Poltergeist Hill
programme.desc: When a ghostly encounter in a cemetery is caught on camera, experts use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate if something paranormal is at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Monster Spider
programme.desc: A massive spider's web takes over a park, leading experts to investigate if this monstrous trap could capture a human. A tree spurts out thick red blood, and some believe it could be an undiscovered species of carnivorous plant.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday at Yellowstone
programme.desc: Evidence of ghostly apparitions is captured at a Civil War battlefield. When mysterious blue fires start near Yellowstone, experts worry if a super volcano eruption is imminent. Near the site of the Salem witch trials, an eerie spectacle stuns scientists.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in the Abyss
programme.desc: When footage of a strange deep-sea vessel is uncovered, experts wonder if its evidence of an autonomous alien craft sent to explore earth, and using cutting-edge tech, investigators follow the clues to an unexpected explanation.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freak of the Deep
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover an unknown monster thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Killer fog threatens a town in the American Midwest. A truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Vampire Down Under
programme.desc: A strange creature on the site of one of the worst nuclear disasters ever sparks fears of a terrifying genetic mutation. New evidence suggests a legendary predator with a thirst for blood might have come back from the dead.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: SWAT team negotiator Jake Byas faces the toughest challenge of his career: dealing with an armed murder suspect barricaded on a ledge who's threatening to kill himself and anyone who tries to get him down; another team surrounds the home of a drug dealer.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: A car used to rob a large cache of assault rifles is found parked outside a house in a Dallas suburb; a sniper must call out a possibly armed and dangerous suspect from his home; but when a young boy comes out, all strategies must be changed.

programme.desc: The Maze Prison held Catholic and Protestant prisoners, along with paramilitary groups.

programme.title: The Big House: Folsom

programme.title: The Big House: Parchman

programme.title: The Big House: Attica Prison
programme.desc: This prison was hailed as a model for the confinement of the most dangerous criminals.

programme.title: The Big House: Montana State Prison
programme.desc: Today, the state prison in Deer Lodge, Montana operates as both a ranch and a modern high-security prison but its legacy is dark and its history is marked by violent uprisings.

programme.title: The Big House: The Lewisburg Federal
programme.desc: Examine the history and inmate roster of what was once America's most humane prison.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Pritchert
programme.desc: Craig Pritchert and his girlfriend are a modern day Bonnie and Clyde. After falling in love, the two go on a bank robbery spree, and flee the country with $500,000 in cash. After being spotted in Cape Town, the FBI sends a team to take the two down.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Female Forces: DUI's and Don'ts
programme.desc: A drunken male suspect gets a little rough; a public indecency suspect causes trouble.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Behind the Barn
programme.desc: 20-year-old Kristy Ray is living at home and working her way through college until one day when she is shockingly abducted. Local law enforcement will need the help of the FBI and community members as they race to find Kristy before time runs out.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Blood in the Barn
programme.desc: Small-town gal Frankie Cochran thinks she's found the one in handsome David Gehrard. But as his behavior brings rising cause for concern, Frankie wonders if a secret from his past might hold more meaning than she first thought.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Shadow Walker
programme.desc: Sandi Musk thinks dating Andy LeFleur is a welcomed distraction from her ongoing divorce. But when it becomes clear he wants more than she's ready to give, she tries to call things off. Thing is, this is one guy who won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: He's Out There
programme.desc: Florida teen Karen Slattery is enjoying a night babysitting her neighbors' children, until a violent intruder bursts into the home and vanishes with no trace. With the community on edge, police know they don't have much time before he strikes again.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Out of Reach
programme.desc: The prime suspect in the murder of an American teacher while living in Seoul, South Korea, in 1988 speaks publicly about the case for the first time in 30 years.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Lake of Lies
programme.desc: Investigators must cast a wide net for clues when the family of Breckenridge resident Sharon Garrison report her missing. There's evidence to suggest she's skipped town, but a set of secret cassette tapes soon point to something far more sinister.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Freeway Phantom
programme.desc: In 1971 and '72, Washington DC is terrorized by a cunning killer who abducts and murders six young African American girls. Police and the community are outraged by the serial killings that target young children in their own neighborhoods.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Springfield Three
programme.desc: On June 6, 1992, Suzie Streeter and Stacy McCall are out celebrating high school graduation. By morning, the teens are missing, along with Suzie's mother. The case leads police on a nationwide search as they work to solve this baffling mystery.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Lake of Lies

programme.desc: In 1971 and '72, Washington DC is terrorized by a cunning killer who abducts and murders six young African American girls. Police and the community are outraged by the serial killings that target young children in their own neighborhoods.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Springfield Three
programme.desc: On June 6, 1992, Suzie Streeter and Stacy McCall are out celebrating high school graduation. By morning, the teens are missing, along with Suzie's mother. The case leads police on a nationwide search as they work to solve this baffling mystery.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Out of Reach
programme.desc: The prime suspect in the murder of an American teacher while living in Seoul, South Korea, in 1988 speaks publicly about the case for the first time in 30 years.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Family
programme.desc: Allegations of stolen children, drugs, abuse and a leader who claimed to be the second coming of Christ, lead authorities to a cult that began in Australia and led the FBI to New York.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Family... A Cult Revealed
programme.desc: Det. Lex de Man was on the trail of 'The Family' cult leader, Anne Hamilton-Byrne and her husband, when he got a tip that they were in New York. With the help of the FBI, he found them in the Catskills and escorted them home. Peter Van Sant reports.

programme.title: American Monster: Alabama Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When a man is struck down by a mysterious sickness, the entire town grieves but when his daughter also falls ill, the family becomes suspicious.

programme.title: American Monster: The Last Broadcast
programme.desc: After a taping of their local-access TV show in rural Vermont, Chrissy and Charlie Billis have a terrible accident, smashing their car into a tree. Only one survives. But tapes from the couple's TV show suggest a sinister tale behind what really happened.

programme.title: American Monster: Take Me to the River
programme.desc: Coming home from church, a local preacher finds his wife brutally stabbed and beaten, the apparent victim of a home invasion. His alibi is sound, as are their two grown sons. However, several details just don't add up. The truth shocks everyone.

programme.title: American Monster: Push Record
programme.desc: In Colorado, second-time spouses Harold and Toni Henthorn seem to dote on their young daughter and each other, until their idyllic life is shattered by a deadly hiking accident. Their happy home videos conceal a deadly predator who nearly escaped justice.

programme.title: American Monster: Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Todd and Rachel Winkler's life looks exquisite from the outside, but inside things are falling apart. Seen on video, their happy marriage hides the terrible secrets and mind-games that can only lead to one conclusion.

programme.title: American Monster: Backyard Daddy
programme.desc: In Ogden, Utah, Stephen and Becky Vargas appear to have it all. Behind the picture perfect life seen in these rare home videos, jealousy and control issues are abound. But no one thought their marriage would end - in murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Off-Camera
programme.desc: An obsessive video blogger and mother of five shares every detail of her rollercoaster life with her husband and their children online. But one night, intruders tie her up and kidnap her husband and execute him. It seems someone has been keeping secrets.

programme.title: American Monster: The Craigslist Killer
programme.desc: Family and faith have always been important to Richard Beasley, as these home videos show. Which is why it's so scary when one day - the Ohio man vanishes. Especially after police discover that an online monster has been luring local men to their deaths.

programme.title: American Monster: Smoke Gets in Your Eyes
programme.desc: When a devastating fire at the Kohnle family home leaves a family member dead, it appears to be a tragic accident. As the evidence mounts up, it's the testimony of two young kids who lead the police to decipher if it was an accident, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Shattered: Do You Know My Voice?
programme.desc: Linda Hardin is convinced Grant is the perfect husband. In 2017, when he's arrested for murder, Linda believes police have the wrong man. Then officers show up at her door with evidence of another crime and her devotion is put to the test.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War, Hot War
programme.desc: A look at the crucial events of the 1960s: U.S. troops in Vietnam, the USSR's warheads in Cuba and the moon landing.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War, Hot War
programme.desc: A look at the crucial events of the 1960s: U.S. troops in Vietnam, the USSR's warheads in Cuba and the moon landing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Smoky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: A family of five builds a forever home on their 46-acre property overlooking the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin of No Return
programme.desc: An outdoorsy family of three is determined to build a mammoth off-grid cabin along Idaho's Salmon River after one of their properties was destroyed by a fire. The family takes on rapids to portage out materials and must finish before low tide hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cob Cottage
programme.desc: After years of apprenticing, Sonia is putting her skills to the test by building her first house: an off-grid cob cottage on top of an Oregon mountain. Her lack of experience and the Pacific Northwest's rainy season could wash away her dreams.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp
programme.desc: After buying her parents' old summer camp in Bridgton, a mother calls on the crew to help her completely renovate the home for her parents to retire in full-time. With a $40,000 budget and an open time line, the crew transform it into a retirement space.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Nelson House
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew saves pieces of a house in Mt. Jackson, VA. Their main focus is on the clay-fired roof and on the oversized cornice bracket.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Pinehurst Steam Plant
programme.desc: The Dawgs head to Pinehurst, NC, to salvage an old steam plant that used to run the town. They remove some cool valves and find extra salvage in a shed near the building.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Last Trip to Cap Center
programme.desc: The Dawgs focus their attention on the exterior finishes of the Boulevard at the Capital Centre to complete their last round of salvaging in Largo, MD. Later, the team transforms a box of old farm equipment into a one-of-a-kind build.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lexington Storefront
programme.desc: The crew take a stab at a refurbished storefront in historic downtown Lexington, Virginia. This second-generation salvage requires a lot of finesse, as the building is being renovated rather than destroyed. Windowpanes become a room divider.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Meek Farmhouse
programme.desc: Mike and Robert remove a two-piece staircase from a farmhouse in Marion, VA. The guys also pick through a train yard. Back at the shop, Mike builds a bar from panel doors as a surprise for a customer's husband.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Parkville Farmhouse
programme.desc: The team heads to Parkville, MD, to salvage a classic farmhouse. They remove steel from the front porch, doors, and windows from the outside while inside they work to remove radiators, banisters and wainscotting.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Fringer Cannery
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the crew salvage an old iron ore mine that was converted into a cannery in the 1930s. Main items include a curved I-beam, oversized pressure-cookers, and a canning carousel.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Martinsville Burned House
programme.desc: The dawgs head to Martinsville, VA, to salvage a house that was condemned after an electrical fire. Knowing they have a customer looking for a kitchen island, Mike and Robert take advantage of a granite counter in the burned-down home.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Last Trip to Cap Center
programme.desc: The Dawgs focus their attention on the exterior finishes of the Boulevard at the Capital Centre to complete their last round of salvaging in Largo, MD. Later, the team transforms a box of old farm equipment into a one-of-a-kind build.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lexington Storefront

programme.desc: Mike and Robert remove a two-piece staircase from a farmhouse in Marion, VA. The guys also pick through a train yard. Back at the shop, Mike builds a bar from panel doors as a surprise for a customer's husband.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Docked Out: Hammock Dock: Play, Eat, Relax
programme.desc: The Docked Out crew builds a custom dock for a family of three with two slips for their watercrafts, room to dine and a surprise pullout hammock. On shore, they build a custom stone fire pit with a seating area perfect for relaxing under the stars.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Boomtown Builder: 1901 Printer's House
programme.desc: Tim helps a Jerome, Arizona, homeowner tackle an overwhelming restoration. He peels back decades of bad renovations to uncover clues that influence the direction of the build and solve the mystery of the home's original owner.

programme.title: Boomtown Builder: 1912 Baker's House
programme.desc: A local sheriff and his wife call in Tim's help to modernize their home while keeping its historical nature. The original character of this house was stripped away by years of bad renovations, a bad design and a challenging layout.

programme.title: Boomtown Builder: 1912 Grocery Market House
programme.desc: Tim helps a couple in Jerome, AZ, tackle a 100-year-old converted grocery market. This monumental restoration creates special obstacles, including the removal of a load-bearing beam and custom-built furniture inspired by historical pieces.

programme.title: Boomtown Builder: 1914 Dentist's House
programme.desc: Tim McClellan is recruited to revamp a couple's 100-year-old guest quarters in Jerome, AZ. Originally built for the town dentist, Tim cracks open the history books and rolls up his sleeves to transform the shabby suite into a historic treasure.

programme.title: Boomtown Builder: 1914 Middle Management House
programme.desc: Tim helps an overwhelmed young family restore their house in Jerome, AZ. Originally built for a copper mine manager, Tim uncovers high-end details and adds even more authentic features to the once illustrious home.

programme.title: Boomtown Builder: 1915 Smelter House
programme.desc: Tim McClellan lends his talents to two amazing spaces that need reimagining in Clemenceau, Arizona. He creates wildly unique builds while unearthing the mysterious history of an adobe outbuilding.

programme.title: Boomtown Builder: 1928 Teacher's House
programme.desc: Tim is recruited by a Jerome, AZ, family to help restore their 90-year-old teacher's boarding house that has fallen into disrepair but retains much of its original detail. Tim creates a special piece of heirloom quality furniture to be cherished.

programme.title: Boomtown Builder: 1930s Road Grader's House
programme.desc: Tim McClellan is enlisted to restore and modernize a one-of-a-kind river rock house built by the town's first road grader in Cottonwood, AZ. He uncovers some amazing historic details as he peels back the layers of the home's 1970s remodel.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Taking Down the Lincoln Cabin and Building a Dog Trot
programme.desc: Mark and the guys work to dismantle a barn built by Abe Lincoln's uncle around 1830.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Big Ol' Buckeye Cabin
programme.desc: The builders have never seen a log home as large as this Ohio cabin. They discovery it's filled with history, craftsmanship and a lot of cherished memories. Mark also gives the cabin owner tips on how to convert the bar into a modern home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Cowboy Party Barn in New Braunfels, TX
programme.desc: Mark and the guys return to Texas to build a gigantic party barn out of an old timber frame. They use old-fashioned tools to retrofit the barn for modern use, and they install a rare swing beam in the center bent.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Lone Star Boneyard
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the crew start a new boneyard in Texas by building a timber frame barn and two log cabins with some help from their new business partner. Mark gets his first look at the incredible party barn they built the last time they were in Texas.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hope Rises in White Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: After the flood waters recede, the Barnwood Builders join the recovery efforts in their hometown of White Sulphur Springs, WV. They build a timber frame pavilion as the centerpiece of a memorial park, and the community builds barn wood picnic tables.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheesy Rider
programme.desc: At the Prince William County Fair in Manassas, Va., Noah Cappe eats big with a monumental grilled cheese and has his interested peaked by the crab dip-topped Chesapeake Bay poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A Guac to Remember
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes the west coast by storm, starting with the Pacific National Exhibition in Vancouver. He gorges on the Big Pickle Dog, then stands at attention for the Colonel Katsu Bao, an Asian-inspired chicken taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jurassic Pork
programme.desc: Noah Cappe bites into some classic Tennessee hot chicken, tastes authentic home cooking with Meme's meatloaf sammy, and samples a pair of sinfully sweet fusion treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Zacho Libre
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Charlotte, Mich. for the Eaton County Fair, where he takes a swing at the PB battered burger, then goes coco-nutty for the pina colada shrimp tacos.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sleepy Hollow, NY
programme.desc: Casey visits spooky Sleepy Hollow, New York, where he tries the massive headless horseman burger and takes on the Dawg House challenge in which a roll of the dice chooses twelve insanely topped hot dogs that he must eat in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Saint Paul, MN
programme.desc: Casey's latest delicious detour brings him to Saint Paul for an indoor food truck park, a timeless diner and a terrible twosome of crepes and Thai rolled ice cream.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Super Spicy
programme.desc: Grab a glass of milk and get ready to experience fiery meals from around the country. Ted Allen, Marcela Valladolid, Michael Symon and more are sharing their favorite burning hot dishes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Kids' Menu
programme.desc: From macaroni and cheese to milkshakes to pizza, these are the greatest dishes found on- and inspired b- the kids' menu. Alex Guarnaschelli shares her comfort food lunch favourite from Ted's Bulletin in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Chefs and food experts share their picks for a Thanksgiving to remember. Anne Burrell devours a turkey leg sandwich at Henry Public in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Fried Favorites
programme.desc: Fire up the fryer for the crispiest and crunchiest dishes this country has to offer, from gravy-smothered French fries in Cleveland, Ohio, to tempura-battered bacon in New York City.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: The Relic Raiders
programme.desc: When Kaz and the team arrive on a mysterious planet to buy supplies, they find the outpost has been abandoned and a secret Sith Temple has been raised.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: Rendezvous Point
programme.desc: Doza attempts to meet a Resistance pilot from his past. Meanwhile the pilot has been captured by the First Order.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something Fluffy
programme.desc: When mysterious but adorable creatures called Mayoi suddenly appear in San Fransokyo, Hiro is convinced that they’re part of some nefarious plot by Liv Amara.

programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays

programme.title: DuckTales: The Infernal Internship of Mark Beaks
programme.desc: Huey competes with Dewey for a coveted internship with Duckburg's newest tech billionaire Mark Beaks, while Scrooge and Glomgold team up to take this annoying new competitor down.

programme.title: DuckTales: McMystery at McDuck McManor
programme.desc: When Scrooge unexpectedly disappears during his birthday party, Huey, Dewey and Louie find themselves hosting a mystery party where everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: A Tale of Two Stans
programme.desc: Stan decides to run for Mayor of Gravity Falls to earn the kids’ and the townsfolk respect.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: College Behind Bars: No One Ever Taught Me Any of That

programme.desc: Sebastian, Dyjuan and Tamara reflect on the difficult circumstances of their childhood, while the debate team prepares to face the University of Vermont. Brian and Rodney are accused of breaking prison rules and sent to the solitary housing unit, SHU.

programme.title: Sit and Be Fit: All Systems Go!
programme.desc: Exercises for the brain and several body systems including vestibular and lymphatic are shown.

programme.title: Arthur: Mr. Ratburn and the Special Someone: The Feud

programme.title: Wild Kratts: Back in Creature Time: Go Dodo Go

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum: I Am Julia Child/ I Am Neil Armstrong

programme.title: Peg + Cat: The Richard the Third Problem/ The Lemonade Problem

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Daniel Does Gymnastics/ The Big Slide

programme.title: Movie: Santa's Boots

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: When You Die
programme.desc: What really happens when we die? For thousands of years, the dreams and visions of the dying have captivated cultures. But what are they and what causes them? And are they real?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Daughter's Journey
programme.desc: A woman still haunted by her mother's disappearance 20 years before, decides to investigate herself. She finds her mother's old diary and discovers a grisly family secret that could explain just what happened to her mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: A forensic scientist makes history when he uses material from a dentist's office to solve a 10-year-old crime involving an elderly couple that was brutally murdered during a robbery.

programme.title: The Dead Wives Club: Vendetta
programme.desc: Sara Raras was a 35-year-old statistician who used her brilliant mind to calculate risk for a living at the National Security Agency. But this new mother could never have predicted the events that led to her haunting murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Risky Whiskey
programme.desc: Josh and Bill rebuild bigger and better. Lance takes a risk on a new kind of whiskey, while Jeff and Mark prep their indoor still site. Tickle and crew battle the elements in Kentucky. Tim gives the North Carolina distillery a backwoods makeover.

programme.title: Moonshiners: The Trouble with Tickle
programme.desc: Tickle returns to Tim's legal distillery and discovers he's traded one prison for another. Mark and Digger unearth a trove of Popcorn's shine. Josh finds an untapped market at a biker rally, only to learn the cost of entry is more than the ticket price.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle Runs Again
programme.desc: Moonshine's prodigal son, Tickle, returns from a year in jail to the Appalachian backwoods. With long-time partner, Tim, determined to stay legal, Tickle recruits an old friend to make an inaugural run of shine and re-stake his claim as an outlaw shiner.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Tickle in a Pickle
programme.desc: With Extra Shine bonus scenes: Tickle returns to the world of outlaw shine, Mark and Digger rediscover Popcorn's mystery multi-grain shine and Mike hires a new partner.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Corn-fed Conundrum
programme.desc: With Extra Shine bonus scenes: Tickle helps Tim rediscover his roots as an outlaw while Mark and Digger contend with an unruly herd of cattle. Later, Mike and Jerry make a plan to gain access to a hidden site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tim's Temptation
programme.desc: Tim and Tickle return to the scene of past crimes. Mark and Digger scramble to rescue a legacy mash from escaped livestock. Mark and Huck build a double proofing still.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: No Guts, No Glory Holes
programme.desc: Fred and his crew return to the glory hole to complete unfinished business. Dustin's crew strikes gold, but are blocked by massive boulders and must engineer an insane system of winches and pulleys to go deeper and get down to bedrock.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tim's Temptation
programme.desc: Tim and Tickle return to the scene of past crimes. Mark and Digger scramble to rescue a legacy mash from escaped livestock. Mark and Huck build a double proofing still.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: The Pound Zone
programme.desc: Dustin's crew finds an ideal claim to mine, but to get down to the gold they have to make it through the waterfall's pound zone. Fred brings in a new miner, only to have his path to bedrock gold is blocked by massive boulders.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Mark and Digger: Legends and Legacy
programme.desc: Mark and Digger celebrate their greatest hits and misses. Trace the paths that set these two legends on a crash course with destiny and one another.

programme.title: Inside the FBI
programme.desc: Agents from the San Diego FBI office share details of ongoing cases including a Mexican Mafia takedown and a drug cartel mass murder.

programme.title: America's Most Secret: Structures
programme.desc: Explore some of America's most secret locations and what lies behind the walls.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Mayan Treasure
programme.desc: An explorer searching for treasure at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by a mysterious underwater fog. Thousands of fish spontaneously jump to their deaths. Something alien appears over the skies of Lost Angeles.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Ice Monster
programme.desc: A giant creature in an armor of ice is spotted in the Alaskan wild, and some suspect it's a deadly mythical monster. A jet has a close encounter with an unknown object. Evidence of a deadly lightning strike invites paranormal explanations.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Wrath of Thor
programme.desc: When a ghostly figure is caught on tape stalking people in Japan, some fear its hard evidence of a horrifying local legend.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bull by the Horns
programme.desc: The Wolfpack's quest for complete freedom takes a big step forward with livestock, including a risky 2000lb longhorn bull. Noah and his new wife Rhain Alisha arrive to start making their new life on the mountain with a monumental announcement.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A One Track Mind
programme.desc: Sarah, an RN, has come to the salon with her heart set on one particular lace dress. Kelly is certain she wants a particular ball gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Same Dress, Different Girl
programme.desc: Bride Kasey has OCD, which can be debilitating for her decision-making. Angela arrives in alterations with second thoughts.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Facilitators
programme.desc: Tamika has come to the salon accompanied by her wedding planner, her stylist, and family members.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: For the Love of Mom
programme.desc: Candice is shopping with her mom for her wedding that's just 21 days away. Tabitha has made salon history by spending $70,000.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Big Entourage, Bigger Opinions
programme.desc: Three brides are forced to battle against big opinions in order to score the dress of their dreams.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Father of the Bride
programme.desc: Daddy's girl, Katie, comes to the salon hoping to find the perfect mermaid style dress.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Mom's Gonna Find Out
programme.desc: Barry and Kim leave the farm for a night to celebrate their anniversary, putting Micah and Lydia in charge. They just have one rule: Ethan and Olivia aren't allowed to visit the farm while they're away. The Plath kids party and some uninvited guests join.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: A Very Busby Thanksgiving
programme.desc: The Busbys plan a very special Thanksgiving, but bad news for Mimi may throw the holiday into turmoil. When Adam and Danielle find out that Riley and Parker are moving up to a different classroom, Adam struggles with the idea of separating the quints.

programme.title: Counting On: Marriage Bootcamp
programme.desc: Jinger and Jeremy decide to hold a yard sale before their big move to L.A. They must put their haggling skills to work and try to sell as much as they can. Meanwhile, the married couples attend a marriage retreat where they focus on their relationships.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: No Strings Attached
programme.desc: After the request for Isaac to join the band is denied by Barry and Kim, the family divide grows. Kim and Barry try to do damage control by extending a large and surprising olive branch to Ethan and Olivia. Moriah shares her desire for college.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: Courtney Cox
programme.desc: Courteney Cox traces her maternal line back to ambitious and ruthless relatives who plotted and murdered their way to power in medieval times; and she's shocked to discover an ancestor who's one of European history's most famous characters.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: Jennifer Grey
programme.desc: Jennifer Grey discovers much more about the grandfather she thought she knew as she uncovers how he survived adversity to become a beacon of his community, and discovers a great-grandmother whose devastating tragedy stopped her from making it to America.

programme.title: Hodges Half Dozen: Adventures in Toddler Potty Training
programme.desc: Liz and Daniel try to potty train Rowan while keeping up with the needs of the quints. Daniel's brothers surprise Liz and Rowan with a playground for their backyard. As Connell struggles to gain weight, Liz and Daniel worry he may require a risky surgery.

programme.title: Hodges Half Dozen: The Quints' First Halloween
programme.desc: The Hodges get ready for their first Halloween with their half dozen kids, including matching costumes for the quints. Later, Liz and Daniel are shocked to learn that Nolan, Connell, Liam and Dillon have medical conditions that may require surgeries.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Victoria
programme.desc: Victoria's boyfriend moves in on a trial basis to see if he can handle her jarring and flush free lifestyle.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Stephanie/ Larry
programme.desc: Stephanie's cheap behaviour embarrasses her boyfriend, Patrick, who thinks they have plenty of money to spend.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Merry Cheapskate Christmas
programme.desc: Sarah visits junkyards for her family's Christmas gifts. Shelley creates a Christmas 'turkey' out of ground meat, chicken and turkey legs.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Knock, Knock, It's Theresa!
programme.desc: Theresa surprises people with readings set up by their friends and family. From a salon to a doughnut shop to pretending to be a substitute babysitter, Theresa is showing up in the most unlikely places to deliver healing.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Guess Who?
programme.desc: It's an all-surprise, all-Knock and Shock special! Theresa surprises unsuspecting people at a hotel and a dentist's office. Later Theresa surprises the kidney donor who saved her friend's life after seeing the show last year.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Campstove Stuffing
programme.desc: A new doctor must stand up to a superior who wants to send his wife into surgery with undiagnosed rectal bleeding. A man comes into the ER with a surprising body part stuck inside a camping stove. A six-year-old boy has a rare massive stroke.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Drunk and Drunker
programme.desc: A martial arts instructor suffers abdominal pains that quickly turn into a deadly diagnosis; when teenage victims of a car crash fill his small ER, a doctor must make critical decisions.

programme.title: Gypsy Sisters: It's Been One Long, Hot Summer
programme.desc: As the summer ends, the ladies settle into their new beginnings. Kayla organizes a luau bash for the clan, Mellie plans a baptism for baby Richard; Sheena and Annie mend their marriages. Later at the luau, Mellie lashes out at JoAnn, who fights back.

programme.title: Gypsy Sisters: A Family on Thin Ice
programme.desc: After months of reconciliation, Kayla and Nettie find themselves at odds. Kayla throws Sissy and Richard a belly dancing themed birthday party.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Infiniti and Dave
programme.desc: 19-year-old dancer Infiniti wants Nev and Max to help her find out if her online love is real. What the pair uncover is far shadier than either of them had ever imagined.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Larissa and Anthony
programme.desc: After being catfished by her high school best friend, Larissa turn to her online friend Anthony for support. Feelings between them grew to love, but after a few false moves on Anthony's part, Larissa is worried he too is lying.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lauren and Derek
programme.desc: Lauren met Derek on MySpace years ago, yet they've never met in real life. Derek is caring, supporting Lauren after she had a baby with a former boyfriend.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Andrew and Zac
programme.desc: Andrew thought he met the perfect match on Tinder in Zac until he received a text message from a friend revealing shocking new information. As Nev and Max look into the case, they suspect Zac could be keeping a very big secret.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Bear
programme.desc: Kailyn and her boys say goodbye to the family dog. Jade takes Sean in with surprising results. Briana confronts John about their deteriorating relationship. Chelsea gets a shocking request from Adam's mom. Leah is reminded of her past with Jeremy.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young and Pregnant: Unconvenient
programme.desc: Ashley tries to have carefree girls’ weekend in Vegas. Brianna consults a lawyer. Rachel resents being compared to Malorie. Kiaya struggles to keep her cool with X'Zayveon's mom. Kayla tries to find a way for Izaiah to see his dad.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXV
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling keep their area free from 'space invaders,' nap hard after a 'slumber punch' and see just how weird it gets when cats get their paws on 'too much nip.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Dr. Drew Pinsky
programme.desc: TV personality and Loveline legend, Dr. Drew Pinsky and Rob take a look at some wild people and wonder 'What Went Wrong?' Check out some strong seniors flex their 'Grey Guns.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Big Baby D.R.A.M.
programme.desc: Big Baby D.R.A.M. meets up with Rob, Chanel and Steelo for some Bad Broccoli, to learn to speak Unclish and how to fend off a few Urban Predators.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lil Yachty
programme.desc: Hip hop superstar Lil Yachty joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to check out what's going on in the Yachty Club, celebrate some style trailblazers, and stay focused with the unfazed clan.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXV
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo discover that life is hard out here for a Josh, reveal what you have to do to get super fired, and see what it takes for a dog to become a K-8.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sam Sadler
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined all the way from the UK by YouTube's Sam Sadler to rock out to some 'pins and needles' and get 'scared forever.'

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Little Bugs

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Caged Tiger
programme.desc: After their 'bro-cation,' Cyborg, Beast Boy and Robin return closer than ever but their bro-mentum is interrupted by Dr. Light. Teen Titans Bro!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Waffles

programme.title: North Woods Law: Breaking and Entering
programme.desc: Officer Lucas attempts to track down trespassers who tore up land owned by Fish and Game. On Mt. Mousilauke, Officer Towne races to assist an injured 11-year-old hiker and Officer Courtney confronts a group of fishermen about an illegal catch.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Treacherous Trails
programme.desc: During a busy winter weekend, Lt. Boudreau encounters kite skiers, an illegal fire sled and a vandalized bob-house. Officer Canfield searches for a deer with an arrow in its head. Then, Officers Demler and Towne head our on a mountain rescue.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Frozen Over
programme.desc: Officer Hannett patrols for ice fishermen while Lt. Boudreau investigates a hunter who shot towards a road. Officer Holmes deals with a raccoon hiding in a warm chimney. And later, Officer St. Pierre goes on his first dive recovery under the ice.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Hunting Havoc
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Trainee Crouse investigate a man who shot someone while hunting illegally, while Officer Holmes and Trainee Frye search for evidence of an illegal deer kill. Sergeant Lucas responds to a porcupine wreaking havoc.

programme.title: Northwest Law: Canadian Crabber Bust
programme.desc: It's an international incident when the fish and wildlife officers of Washington State bust poachers coming in from north of the border.

programme.title: Northwest Law: The Weedwhackers
programme.desc: The officers carefully approach a suspect with a machete who is suspected of running an illegal marijuana farm while Sgt. Jewell stumbles upon a young drifter on Moses Lake.

programme.desc: Officer Demler helps a hiker with a severe shoulder injury. Officer Fluette and K-9 Moxie take their certification test. Officer Holmes and trainee Frye look for evidence of an illegal deer kill. Officer MacFadzen bonds with his son on a hunting trip.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Lieutenant Boudreau and trainee Crouse investigate a man who shot someone while hunting illegally. Sergeant Lucas responds to a porcupine wreaking havoc. Later, when a seriously ill hiker is trapped on Mount Garfield, Officer Holmes races to the scene.

programme.desc: Two Bernese mountain dog pups bond with their barnyard neighbours; a trio of Shiba Inu girls challenge their spick-and-span mom with their messy ways; in a litter of mixed breed Chatham Hill retrievers, a pup takes after his boisterous dad.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Devil Cat
programme.desc: Ingrid, Anicka and Nikki have long-standing friendship that is being threatened by Ingrid's hellish cat. Also, Sherin and her Bengal cat may be kicked out of her parents’ home due to his behaviour.

programme.title: The Vet Life: No Goats, No Glory
programme.desc: While Dr. Blue and Dr. Ross help a client at their goat farm, Dr. Lavigne must save a pup with an obstruction in his intestines and a concerned family waiting. Dr. Blue and Dr. Ross compete in a cook-off to see who the best grill master is.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Lucky Break
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff helps a dog with a serious illness. Mel and her daughter rescue a baby squirrel, while Dr. Jeff and Dr. Petra team up to save a beloved cat hit by a car. Dr. Baier gives a rabbit owner a surprise and a tiny dog with a big spirit needs a home.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bears Will Be Bears
programme.desc: The brown bears keep tearing up their exhibit, leaving zoo staff scrambling for a solution. Armani the aardvark gets treated for a tooth infection which has dampened her enthusiasm for digging. And, a group of burrowing owls prepare to move.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Do You Love Me Red Panda?
programme.desc: Nima the red panda lost her partner last year. She is being introduced to a new mate, named Koda. But the pair get off to a bad start when Koda chases Nima up a tree, leaving her hanging from the highest branch.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Village of Wolves

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Left for Dead
programme.desc: Tia races to rescue an emaciated puppy chained to an abandoned home. A couple visits VRC in hope of finding a younger sibling for their dog. And a Good Samaritan needs help rescuing a stray mama dog still bleeding three weeks after giving birth.

programme.desc: Forrest is in the Galapagos seeking the Fernandina Tortoise, an animal that was only seen once, over 100 years ago. The clues are here, along with an abundance of incredibly unique species, raising hopes of a historic discovery.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Time Machines

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Sharpe Shooters
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars check out the forefather of modern machine guns, a Gatling gun. Corey and the Old Man try to hail down a piece of automotive history.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Making Cents
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars consider sending a search party out for Chumlee when he takes off to look at a 1950's Bally's coin operated kiddie ride.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Comic Con
programme.desc: Chumlee and Corey take a look at some sketches drawn by Spider-Man creator Stan Lee. Check out a Japanese machine gun camera.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Captain Rick
programme.desc: A medal from British explorer Captain Cook lands in the shop. Chum hits the green when checking out a golf putter from the famed 1963 Frank Sinatra Invitational. Later, when Rick's stress level hits a new high, Chumlee tries to calm him down.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Spacing Out
programme.desc: Blast off with the Pawn Stars when a 'Space 2005' wristwatch radio rockets into the shop. Then, Rick tries to make a drive-by deal when he checks out a rare, 1964 VW Karmann Ghia.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Old Man Corey
programme.desc: A 1966 Harley Davidson rides into the shop. Find out if Corey risks it all to cruise away with this chopper or if he suffers a major blowout. Then, Rick flashes back to the '60s when a collection of NBC promotional posters unroll in the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rocky Road
programme.desc: Handprints signed by Sylvester Stallone come into the shop. Then, Rick scouts out two signed Norman Rockwell lithographs. Later, Chumlee tries to prove he is more active than everyone thinks he is by entering an arm-wrestling competition.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Triple Axel Pawn
programme.desc: Jam out with the Pawn Stars when a custom Fender quad guitar rocks into the shop. Then, a Wheaties box featuring Tonya Harding skates in. Rick feels the weight of it all when he checks out two steelyard scales from the 1700s.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: E Equals MC Pawn
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars make calculated moves when some handwritten math by Albert Einstein could multiply their profits. Chumlee tries to prove he isn't dim when he pays big bucks to have an antique headlamp tester shining brightly once again.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Thar She Pawns
programme.desc: Rick goes to check out a 1974 Triumph Convertible. Two whale spears find their way into the shop. Chum reminisces over a pair of Popeye water pistols.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Masonic Pawn
programme.desc: Rick gets his hands on a hat worn by Prince and considers the sale. An Egyptian scarab ring scuttles into the shop for evaluation. A WWII era head-shaped glass planter also visits the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Killer Cap
programme.desc: A top hat and pistol said to have once belonged to a Jack the Ripper suspect have Rick greatly intrigued. Corey is set on obtaining a 1920s time clock. Rick and Chum must decide on the purchase of a slew of celebrity signatures and the rights to a game.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Series Rings and Rap Kings
programme.desc: An original Marc Chagall painting finds its way to 'Gold & Silver.' Later, a Boston Red Sox World Series ring may be a home run find. Corey looks into a first edition of Ken Kesey's renowned novel, 'One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn of the Seas
programme.desc: Rick explores a big deal with Captain Cook's sea map, while Chumlee haggles for a prop from Saturday Night Live, and Corey wrestles to win an autographed piece of WWE star Roddy Piper's merchandise. Then, Rick calls Rick Dale to check out an antique bike.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rebel Without a Pawn

programme.desc: In an attempt to make her Glamtronics documentary more interesting and get better marks, Cami causes some drama with the group.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of America's Wonders
programme.desc: New discoveries at America's greatest monuments are revealing their long-lost secrets, and using cutting-edge technology and the latest archaeology, experts find ground-breaking evidence that challenge everything we know about these mysterious places.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Cutting-edge technology is revealing new evidence into the whereabouts of the Holy Grail, and using the latest archaeological methods, investigators are turning up shocking discoveries that could reveal some of the darkest secrets of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
Unearthed: Mount Rushmore: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Delving into the dark secrets behind one of the most iconic landmarks in America: Mount Rushmore. Scientists reveal the secret history of its creation, and what lies behind the rock.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for the Holy Grail

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America

Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Armageddon on the Nile
programme.desc: Cataclysmic changes in ancient Egypt might have been caused by an extraordinary set of international phenomena, and the latest tech helps identify the supernatural culprit. What experts discover reveals a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Lost City of the Sun Cult
programme.desc: When experts unearth a mysterious lost city built by an infamous pharaoh, they find clues of a grisly catastrophe. New discoveries reveal the apocalyptic events that turned this place into hell on earth, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Oil Rig vs. Sinkhole
programme.desc: When an oil rig in a Louisiana lake drills in the wrong place, it causes a massive whirlpool that drains the entire lake; experts investigate why this sinkhole disaster was one of the greatest engineering catastrophes in American history.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Boston's Big Dig Disaster
programme.desc: Boston's Big Dig was one of the most ambitious engineering projects in history, but in 2006, a fatal collapse in one of its tunnels put the ambitious project in doubt; experts reveal what caused this engineering disaster and how it was fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare on Main Street
programme.desc: A railroad bridge on the edge of disaster, a nightmare in a fairy-tale town, and a massive cathedral in calamity are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Chicago's Tower of Terror
programme.desc: When the innovative design of an iconic Chicago skyscraper leads to tragedy, experts must apply cutting-edge tech and the latest engineering methods to fix an urgent, life-or-death problem.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: NASA Under Pressure
programme.desc: When catastrophe strikes Skylab, life on earth is threatened by a space station cratering toward earth, and NASA experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong and if disaster can be averted.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare in Florida
programme.desc: When a brand-new bridge suddenly collapses in Miami, several die in a horrifying calamity. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how an innovative bridge-building technique could be to blame.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: The Towering Inferno
programme.desc: A skyscraper causing hellish heat in downtown Dallas, a swarm of sinkholes, and a landmark with a fatal secret.

programme.desc: In 1990, a teenage boy vanishes. Nearly two decades later, there's still no trace of him, dead or alive. It's a mother's worst nightmare, but one detective refuses to stop looking until he's able to solve this mystery.

programme.title: Shattered: One Wrong Turn
programme.desc: In 2005, in a small Florida town, a doting grandmother interrupts the murder of her grandson. As the investigation into it launches, it's revealed that the witnesses know more than they are letting on.

programme.title: Shattered: The Bodies Out Back
programme.desc: 1986. A 13-year-old girl escapes her captors, then lives in fear they'll return to kill her. A young boy learns his father's fate and realizes his nightmares are memories, and a prison break leads a rookie cop on the hunt for two ruthless murderers.

programme.title: Shattered: End of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1986, Geri Muck searches desperately for her missing daughter, but she has no idea that she's too late. The prosecutor wants justice, the brother wants revenge, but Geri just wants her daughter back.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Beauty for Ashes
programme.desc: In 2016, 33-year-old Tricia Todd was reported missing after failing to pick up her daughter from a babysitter. As her family hoped and prayed, investigators found her online journal that revealed the true horror of what had happened.

programme.title: What Happened to Bo Kirk?
programme.desc: When methodical and consummate family man Bo Kirk makes uncharacteristic withdrawals from a shared checking account and fails to turn up for a family dinner, his wife is certain something has gone horribly wrong.

programme.title: Truth About Murder With Sunny Hostin: Murder at the Window
programme.desc: A new job in a new town seems like a promising start for expectant parents Kent and Malinda Gibbons. But life quickly turns into a nightmare when Kent finds Malinda raped and murdered at home. Detectives find themselves in a race to stop a killer.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Exposed
programme.desc: Three young girls meet a new friend online. Like other boys in the chat rooms, he's around their age, friendly, and flirtatious. Months later his demeanor shifts, trapping the girls in a vicious game from which they can't escape.

programme.title: What Happened to Bo Kirk?
programme.desc: When methodical and consummate family man Bo Kirk makes uncharacteristic withdrawals from a shared checking account and fails to turn up for a family dinner, his wife is certain something has gone horribly wrong.
