programme.desc: Three young girls meet a new friend online. Like other boys in the chat rooms, he's around their age, friendly, and flirtatious. Months later his demeanor shifts, trapping the girls in a vicious game from which they can't escape.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Beauty for Ashes
programme.desc: In 2016, 33-year-old Tricia Todd was reported missing after failing to pick up her daughter from a babysitter. As her family hoped and prayed, investigators found her online journal that revealed the true horror of what had happened.

programme.title: See No Evil: A Date with Dalene
programme.desc: On August 6th 2011, Dalene Carlson vanishes during a Saturday night on the town. Security footage from a local bar reveals a number of potential suspects, each with a motive.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: A father-to-be is shot while out for a morning walk, leaving his wife a widow. Security footage from the scene reveals his final, shocking moments.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Master Manipulator
programme.desc: When Brian Cargill divorced his wife, Kimberly, he thought it was the end of the worst time of his life. Instead, he found himself in a desperate battle to save his son, Jamie, from her deadly wrath.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Cheating Death
programme.desc: Cathy thought she had found the man of her dreams in Peter Tobin. But by the time she discovered his dark secret, it was too late. How would she keep herself and her son alive long enough to escape one of the most evil men in modern history?

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Invited Him In
programme.desc: Jill Garrison thought her second go-around with love would be the one that lasted the rest of her life. But then her quiet town suddenly began to be preyed upon by a nightmarish killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Knew What He Was
programme.desc: Ronald and Patty had always seen the signs that their older brother, Bernard Eugene Giles, had a darker side. When Gene finally lets loose the monster lurking inside, they couldn't help but wonder how things had gone so wrong.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Hate Being Daddy's Girl
programme.desc: When Robin Doll was rescued from her mother's violence and went to live with her father, she thought she had cheated death. She had no way of knowing that the man she looked to as her savior was hiding something even worse.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Cop and the Killer
programme.desc: When Walt Chavis joined the police force, he was prepared to risk his life, but he never imagined the greatest threat he would face would be his own brother or that one day he would be forced to choose between his duty and his family.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Twisted Sister
programme.desc: When Elizabeth Flores was a child, her sister, Louise, tried to shield her from a horrible family secret. But when Louise met David Turpin, that all changed. The girl who ran from monsters became one herself.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: The Butcher of Buffalo
programme.desc: Mother of three Joan Giambra is discovered strangled, lying naked under her comatose 11-year old daughter. The young girl becomes the only hope of catching a serial killer.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Blood In The Water
programme.desc: When a bag containing body parts washes up on the shore of the lake, the search for missing 10-year old Holly Jones becomes a grisly murder investigation. Police must race to find the perpetrator of this shocking crime before another child is murdered.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Alley of Death
programme.desc: When 14-year old Gloria Pointer is found raped and murdered in an alleyway, it is the start of a thirty-year quest for answers by her mother who will not give up until she finds justice for her daughter.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Peace and War
programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War II
programme.desc: By the end of the 70's, war between East and West has been raging for decades. Countless proxy wars have proven how destructive the Cold War can be. It's an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Warmonger
programme.desc: In the early 1980's, the next battlefield in the struggle between communism and democracy emerges, and it's in the United State's own backyard.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Weaponology: French Foreign Legion
programme.desc: Gathered from the four corners of the globe, Legionnaires leave their past behind to fight for the glory of France.

programme.title: Weaponology: Spetsnaz
programme.desc: Spetsnaz are Russia's elite fighting force. From counter terrorist strike squads to special operations experts spearheading the Red Army, these ultimate warriors strike hard and fast.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Weaponology: Spetsnaz
programme.desc: Spetsnaz are Russia's elite fighting force. From counter terrorist strike squads to special operations experts spearheading the Red Army, these ultimate warriors strike hard and fast.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Weaponology: French Foreign Legion
programme.desc: Gathered from the four corners of the globe, Legionnaires leave their past behind to fight for the glory of France.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Warmonger
programme.desc: In the early 1980's, the next battlefield in the struggle between communism and democracy emerges, and it's in the United State's own backyard.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Zoot Suit Riots
programme.desc: In pre-war America street gangs were on the rise. California media stirred up panic about young Mexicans and Latinos. When WWII began, racial tensions increased and they were quickly portrayed as a significant threat, leading to a racial boiling point.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Godfather of London
programme.desc: Billy Hill was the most powerful Kingpin in Britain's post-war underworld, but the secret behind Hill's empire is little known.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Demon Doctor
programme.desc: Known for his dubious medical practices and shady financial deals, the Nazi occupation liberated Dr. Marcel Petio's murderous instincts, enabling him to embark on a shocking killing spree.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Israel
programme.desc: Travel to the Middle East to uncover the very latest weapons being designed for the Israel Defence Forces.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Close Protection
programme.desc: A look at a top secret device that stops terrorists from smuggling weapons onto planes, the newest multi-caliber combat weapon, the latest naval gun and one of the deadliest close quarter weapons.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Guns
programme.desc: A rapid-fire cannon that's becoming a hit with the US military; the personal defence weapon that has the same knockdown as bigger guns, the Gatling gun that rains fire on target and the new multi-calibre assault weapon.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone
programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Future Warrior
programme.desc: An assault riffle that can be converted into a sniper riffle is examined.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hometown Heroes
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the guys sit down to talk about a few of their favourite things: cabins and barns. With special guests, never-before-seen footage and hilarious outtakes, the builders are having fun. Mark also talks about his new house.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Salvaging Pristine Hand-Hewn Logs from a West Virginia Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys travel to the heart of West Virginia, to salvage incredibly rare 170-year-old logs from a perfectly preserved log home. The pressure is on to keep these logs pristine as they take them down.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Rebuilding the 100% Cabin and Restoring a Legacy
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take the 100% cabin to South Carolina where they rebuild it as a hunting cabin. While they are there, they work with the client's kids to build a camping cabin out of their ancestor's log home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Victory Lap
programme.desc: Mark Bowe returns to the finished homes of some of his favourite 'Barnwood Builders' jobs. After months of work, the 100% cabin, Rose's cabin, the Boy Scout cabin and many more are living new lives as modern homes.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Edge of Maine
programme.desc: A creative family builds a three-story tiny house full of clever features in the easternmost property in the U.S. But with limited experience and a tight deadline, they'll need the help of a few locals to get it done. Follow their journey now.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Piney Woods Place
programme.desc: Cat Taylor constructs a remote sanctuary for her and her husband in the woods of Northwest Texas. The two-story home is made from sand, clay and straw.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountaintop
programme.desc: A couple builds their off-grid dream home on a remote mountaintop overlooking the Southwest Montana backcountry. Together they've dreamed up a mountain base camp that's high tech and suits their outdoor lifestyle.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: High Altitude Hideout
programme.desc: Adventure seeker Joey Caiafa sets out to build a mountaintop hideout outside of Leadville, Colorado. He enlists the help of his friends and an architectural designer to trick out the solar-powered space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Piney Woods Place
programme.desc: Cat Taylor constructs a remote sanctuary for her and her husband in the woods of Northwest Texas. The two-story home is made from sand, clay and straw.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountaintop
programme.desc: A couple builds their off-grid dream home on a remote mountaintop overlooking the Southwest Montana backcountry. Together they've dreamed up a mountain base camp that's high tech and suits their outdoor lifestyle.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Docked Out: Paddleboard Dock: Sun and Surf Water Sports Oasis
programme.desc: The crew builds a sun-and-surf themed dock for a family of three. It features a boat slip, solar panels, a swim step for each water access, and areas for both sun and shade. It also includes a custom paddleboard-inspired bench.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: American Rehab: Charleston: Country Victorian Porch
programme.desc: Trent's next project is just outside the city in the small town of Summerville. It's a 107-year-old country Victorian home that has fallen into disrepair over the years.

programme.title: American Rehab: Charleston: Historic Living Foom and Foyer
programme.desc: Trent is careful to save as much of the original house as possible as he begins demolition in the living room and foyer. As soon as demo begins, he realizes termite damage and wood rot have destroyed nearly every surface.

programme.title: American Rehab: Charleston: Octagon Breakfast Nook, Sun Porch and Side Porch
programme.desc: Trent Fasnacht restores the octagon room and sun room, and he creates a new side porch in this phase of the restoration of his 1906 country Victorian just outside Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: American Rehab: Charleston: Historic Kitchen Remodel
programme.desc: Trent rebuilds the kitchen in its original spot at the front of his 1906 country Victorian in Summerville, South Carolina. His design plan calls for custom bead board cabinets, a glass tile backsplash and authentic butcher block countertops.

programme.title: American Rehab: Charleston: Cozy Office and Guest Bedroom With Built-Ins
programme.desc: Licensed Contractor Trent Fasnacht is about half way finished rehabbing his 1906 country Victorian. He is demolishing the home's dated bathroom, and pulling down walls in an office and bedroom.

programme.title: American Rehab: Charleston: Historic Master Suite With Southern Charm
programme.desc: Trent Fasnacht finishes the restoration of his 1906 country Victorian by turning the old 1960s kitchen and dining room addition into a beautiful master suite. Once finished, it exudes coastal calm, with elements of the past repurposed for modern use.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Looking Out for Lava Tubes in Kona
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are on the hunt to find an empty lot with great ocean views. They want to build a spec home on the property that they can turn around and sell in the coming year.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Skylight to the Stars and a Stunning Free-Form Lanai
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler build a brand new house in an upcountry area of the Big Island. Skylights are placed throughout the home, including a giant one in the master bedroom that will allow the homeowners to sleep under the stars.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: A Pool With An Ocean View
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler fly to Maui to get inspiration for renovating a vacation rental property back on the Big Island.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Ocean View Open House
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are ready to sell the first house they ever built in Hawaii, but the Ocean View house needs some freshening up first, including replacing a rotted-out back lanai.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Lava Stamp of Approval
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler create a custom lava-stamp driveway and front lanai that add major curb appeal to a spec home in the Palisades area of Kona.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Refreshing Pool Renovation
programme.desc: The Dickinsons revitalize an algae-filled pool. Diandra finds the perfect glass tile to replace the outdated ceramic waterline tiles, while Tyler fixes the cracked pool deck and builds a stained Douglas fir fence around it.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Flipping a 1970s Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler flip a 1970s fixer-upper to get it ready for a broker's open. They focus on maximizing the ocean views by designing a new floor plan for the kitchen, and adding a thin cable railing on the lanai to open up the view.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Cashing in on Curb Appeal
programme.desc: The Dickinsons' strategy to attract potential buyers to a spec home with the curb appeal of a lava stamp driveway has paid off. A realtor has clients who already want to look at the house, but there's still so much work left to do.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flip School
programme.desc: Two friends flip a home together. One wants the renovation done as soon as possible, while the other moves from one project to another.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Her Way or the Highway
programme.desc: Monica has worked on her own home and believes that she knows everything about construction. Whit thinks she might be making things more difficult than they need to be, but what Monica wants, Monica gets.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Hit the Breaks
programme.desc: Ernie and Megan are school teachers who have decided to flip a house during their summer vacation. While Megan wants to make this house the best it can possibly be, Ernie just wants to finish the flip and hopefully put some money in their pockets.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: High Heels and High Budget
programme.desc: A husband and wife flipping team have found the bargain of a lifetime in one of the country's most expensive zip codes: the Hamptons. They soon find the amazing location may not be worth all the issues they discover in this run-down home.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lone Star Load-Up
programme.desc: Roger is loading up on the best brisket, pork steaks and sausages the Lone Star state has to offer. Ronnie's BBQ in Johnson City attracts locals and barbecue aficionados.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: All You Can Feast
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes to Llano Seco Ranch in Chico, Calif., where he and Charlie Thieriot slow roast a 30-pound porchetta. In Sandy, Ore., Rogers meets caterers Jaret Foster and Mona Johnson and assists in roasting mussels.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Women Fire Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking salutes the country's most impressive and creative female pitmasters, learning a few new roasting methods along the way.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire Festivals
programme.desc: Join the party as Roger Mooking visits three of the greatest fire-roasted ragers that cook mountains of meat and keep the barbecue faithful lining up for more. He attends a church picnic with nearly four tons of meat and a crowd of 4,000 carnivores.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meaty Marvels
programme.desc: In Palatine, IL, Greg and Kristina create Brazilian-style barbecue at Rockin Rodizio.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ and Boils in the Bayou
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Louisiana bayou for barbecue, brunch and a crawfish boil. In Prairieville, L.A., he helps a husband-and-wife team of caterers prepare baby back ribs, brisket and 200 pounds of live crawfish.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Local Legends
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 15 of America's best dishes that have achieved local legend status. From sentimental favorites like deep-dish pizza, patty melts and spaghetti and meatballs to an old-fashioned clambake and lobster roll.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Smokey
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, where a place he went as a kid combines several classic sweets to make a one-of-a-kind dessert burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Build Your Own Burger
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon starts at the ultimate custom burger bar in Providence, Rhode Island, where he chooses from over 400,000 topping combinations to create his own meaty masterpiece.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Giant Meat and Habanero Heat
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with a burger that originated as a late night, off-menu secret and accidentally became the talk of the town. Then, in Seattle, a beer hall serves a mammoth, pretzel-breaded, deep-fried pork shank.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Burnt Ends For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Plainview, N.Y., where a chocolate bacon burger is loaded from top to bottom with sweet and savory indulgence. A restaurant in Columbus, Ohio, has a soy-marinated pineapple hanger steak draped over spicy kimchi fried rice.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Francisco
programme.desc: Adam devours a Mission Style Super Burrito, ginormous sandwiches, and a two-gallon monster sundae.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Nashville, TN
programme.desc: Casey's mouthwatering mission brings him to Tennessee, where he faces his hottest challenge yet: three jumbo chicken tenders smothered in a Carolina Reaper-infused sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Milwaukee, WI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Milwaukee for some epic Brew City eats, including a pitcher-sized Bloody Mary garnished with a whole chicken and a four-and-a-half-pound Reuben sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ
programme.desc: Casey's drive to devour America's most delicious dishes brings him back to his roots: the Jersey Shore. He's here for an explosive sandwich, stuffed lobster and a ghost chili-infused pizza challenge.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Mint For Each Other
programme.desc: With only two weeks until their wedding, Pat and Alli are looking for the perfect cake that pays tribute to his time in the armed services and plays to her love of classic, rustic elegance.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: No Cakes on Deck
programme.desc: With just a few weeks until Geoff and Brittany's wedding the couple still can't agree on their perfect cake.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Twice as Nice
programme.desc: Delpha and Delerice are throwing a lavish birthday party and are in search of the perfect cake. The sisters don't share similar tastes and bakers take on the twins challenge with hopes to keep both happy.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Snack Bar

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: It's A Rainbow
programme.desc: It's a kaleidoscope of color as Alfonso Ribeiro finds out how RW Garcia make their tortilla chips so vibrantly red. Then it's off to Amy's Kitchen for their multicolored, palate-pleasing Thai Red Curry Bowl.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Simple Goodness

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp

programme.title: Movie: The Wolfman
programme.desc: A nobleman returns to his family's estate when his brother disappears. After learning from his fiancée that something has been attacking and killing the villagers, the man heads out to locate his brother.

programme.title: Dublin Murders
programme.desc: Katy is finally laid to rest and all of Knocknaree have come out for the funeral. The public and media pressure to find Katy’s killer is intense. Cassie gets a call from Sam about another dead body.

programme.title: Movie: Colombiana
programme.desc: A young woman witnessed her parents' deaths during her childhood in Bogotá. She has now become an assassin. She works for her uncle as a hit man, but during her own time, she is trying to avenge her parents' deaths by finding the mobster that killed them.

programme.title: Movie: The Day the Earth Stood Still
programme.desc: An advanced life form comes to the Earth to save the planet and the creatures that live there. Human beings are deemed to be the cause of the planet's suffering and are to be eliminated. The life form learns the people are not as evil as they seem.

programme.title: Movie: Alpha

programme.title: Movie: Field of Dreams
